数采公司全景横评 (Data-Collection Companies: Category Scoreboard)

✓ 已核查更新 2026-07-08data-companies-compare

「说人话」:这页把 7 家做机器人数据生意的公司放在一张桌上比:他们信什么、卖什么、技术底子怎么样、谁在付钱、还有什么没人知道。这 7 家分别是:觅蜂(智元分拆的采集设备+数据货架公司)、简智新创 GenRobot(卖采集设备最开源的一家)、鹿明 Lumos(机器人+采集器+数据超市三线并卖)、它石智航 TARS(卖工业机器人、采集自用)、灵初 PsiBot(押注数据手套)、京东(巨头内部部门,发头显给宝妈采数据)、Generalist(美国 DeepMind 系,采集设备只自用)。跟我们的关系一句话:7 家把"采数据喂机器人"这条路线的存在性验证了个遍,但没有一家做"度量衡"(给数据配可核验的误差账本、当中立的质检院)——那正是我们 data-engine-v2 押的三车道主车道。

扩样 (2026-07-12): 批次二 5 家档案已入库(松灵/帕西尼/光轮/星海图/Scale),12 家品类级 pattern 归纳与"度量衡为何空置"裁决见 数据生意的底层 Pattern;本页 7 家表待下次刷新扩为 12 家。

本页只做横向拼桌,所有事实全部出自 7 张已核档案页(见文末 Sources),不引入任何新的外部宣称;各家单独的证据分级、引语原文、纠错记录以档案页为准。

1. 一张总表

先解释表头里的行话:GTM(go-to-market,怎么把东西卖出去、谁掏钱);本体(机器人硬件身体);遥操作(人远程操控机器人干活,像开体感遥控车);UMI 类手持爪(不用机器人、人手拿着采数据的夹爪)。

技术栈披露度打分标准(5 分制,每项 1 分):①数据格式/SDK 公开可验(买家能自己打开验货);②开源代码/数据集真实存在且可下载(不是空壳仓库);③有量化误差数字+方法学(论文或报告级,不是营销形容词);④官方渠道有成体系的规格表数字;⑤有专利/第三方裁定/独立评测背书。打分只认档案页里核过的证据,通稿数字不算官方渠道。

公司一句话身份愿景论纲主力产品披露度(5 分)GTM/谁付钱资金最大未知
觅蜂 Maniformer(档案)智元 75% 持股的分拆子公司,CEO 姚卯青"一亿小时真机数据触发涌现";2026 千万小时产能MEgo View 头戴 + MEgo Gripper 手持爪 + MEgo Engine 管线 + 467 条数据集的交易市场0/5——零格式、零开源、零误差、官网规格字段出厂为空、零专利;API 里还躺着可复现的 NULL 缺陷母公司市场化下单 ¥1,000+/h;零具名外部付费客户;真机数据锚价 ¥500–1,000/h两轮"数亿元",红杉领投+国方创投1mm 轨迹宣称的机制与误差分布;市场货架 12 周疑似零增长 vs 万台终端叙事
简智新创 GenRobot(档案)小鹏/Momenta 系创业公司,"From Human for Human"行业缺的不是模型是数据;自动驾驶数据飞轮打法平移DAS Ego/Gripper/Dex 采集设备全家桶 + 13,000 小时 CC-BY-SA 开源数据集;订单自报 10,000+ 台3/5——MCAP 格式+MIT 开源工具+docs 规格表俱全;但无误差分布、零专利,营销"毫米级"与规格表"<1cm"差一个量级蚂蚁灵波战略合作(最硬一单,付费未确认);全网零价格数字11 个月四轮,百度/Momenta/速腾/顺为/蚂蚁/滴滴,前三轮累计超 ¥2 亿任何一个价格;误差分布
鹿明 Lumos(档案)追觅系,本体+采集器+数据超市三线并卖Scaling Law 在具身成立,先囤数据产能;2026 目标 100 万小时LUS2 人形(京东 19.9 万起)+ FastUMI 采集器家族(Go ¥2–3 万/套)+ 数据超市(约 ¥100/百条)1/5——全品类唯一公开零售价,但公司层零开源(学术仓库是社区资产)、精度机制/格式/同步全空白三菱电机既是客户又是 A 轮领投(MOS 进其质检产线)——全七家最硬的真金白银;京东电商直卖7 轮累计近 ¥10 亿FastUMI Pro"1mm 全球最高精度"用了什么传感器(学术版 T265 实测误差 10.5–24.1mm)
它石智航 TARS(档案)华为 ADS/百度 Apollo 系,卖工业真机为主业千万小时数据是创始人自认的"bet";明确拒绝遥操作与仿真A1 轮式机器人(苏州汽车厂 15 台在岗+吉尼斯线束装配纪录)+ SenseHub 穿戴采集(自用)+ WIYH 1,000+ 小时开源数据集3/5——论文+对应专利+吉尼斯第三方裁定+LeRobot 桥接工具;但 SenseHub 规格与同步零披露,"毫米级"无机制真部署 15 台(客户匿名);"1,000 台订满"无法拆验;天海电子是唯一具名伙伴约 $6.97 亿,高瓴+红杉+美团;估值口径 ¥130–200 亿未调和SenseHub 传感器栈;"千小时开源 vs 百万小时累计"两个数字的关系
灵初 PsiBot(档案)北大系+硬件老兵,押注外骨骼数据手套人手原生数据优于遥操,成本可降至遥操 1/10;自称"数据标准制定者"Synglove 手套 + Psi-R2/W0 模型 + 1,000 小时 CC-BY-4.0 开源数据(自报累计 95,472 小时)2/5——GitHub/HF 开源是实打实的(AAAI 论文+代码),但核心手套连自由度都对不上号(21 vs 62+ DoF)、零同步宣称、零误差分布零具名付费客户;北京服装仓储 100 套"部署中";双源独立报道称行业订单多为"公关性质展示采购"天使+Pre-A 合计 ¥20 亿;智元疑似种子股东(工商未核)手套真实规格;36氪指出的厘米级精度天花板能否突破
京东具身数据(档案)集团内部部门(探索研究院+京东云),非创业公司刘强东"涅槃计划":千万小时人类视频,快递员转型机器人技师JoyEgoCam 头显(¥20,000/台)+ EgoLive 数据集(1,680 小时)+ 数据商店(约 ¥200/h 批发)+ JoyAI-RA 模型2.5/5——全品类唯一公布量化误差的(论文级:0.9m 内深度平均误差 <8.75mm,算法指名);但 HF 上宣称 CC-BY 的数据集实际零上架,商店无价目无 API零具名付费客户;采集员月薪 ¥3,000–4,000,折算到手约 ¥30–50/h 对 ¥200/h 批发价,毛利极厚不适用(集团自营);另对外投了 6 家本体公司EgoLive 是否真可下载;数据商店有没有人买
Generalist(档案)美国 DeepMind 系(RT-2/PaLM-E 作者创业),San Mateo"physical AGI";能力随真实交互数据可预测地涨(公开 scaling 曲线)"Data hands"手持爪(只自用不卖)+ GEN-0/GEN-1 模型(50 万+小时语料,自评 99% 成功率)0.5/5——模型侧博客有量化曲线,设备侧对 Forbes 明确"拒绝透露";零论文、零专利、GitHub 仅 3 个 fork、HF 零模型零付费客户,连签约仪式都没有;只有发邮件申请的 Early Access累计 >$5 亿,估值约 $2B(NVIDIA/Bezos/Radical)设备的一切:传感器、算法、误差、成本

批判读法(完整句子): 这张表最扎眼的一列是 GTM——七家公司,合计融资折合人民币过百亿,却只找得出一个"既付钱又留名"的数据相关客户(三菱电机,而且它买的是机器人不是数据)。也就是说,整个品类的收入故事目前建立在母公司内购、战投情谊单和"数十家匿名客户"上。这对我们意味着什么:我们的收入模型绝不能建在"数据买家已被验证"的假设上,v2 的"证书先于语料、器械生意不依赖数据买家"顺序被七家的集体空白再次坐实。

2. 格局读法

2.1 按 2×2 格位摆桌

先解释格位:我们把采集方式按两个轴切成四格——横轴是劳动性质(副产品=人干自己的活顺带被记录 vs 专职=雇人专门采数据),纵轴是标签路径(动作数据是"算出来的"recovered——用 SLAM 之类算法从画面反推,可能带看不见的误差;还是"传感器直接量出来的"measured——编码器直读,硬真值)。

recovered(算出来的)measured(量出来的)
副产品劳动(蝉格)最挤:觅蜂 MEgo View、京东 JoyEgoCam、它石 SenseHub、GenRobot DAS Ego——四家头戴/穿戴全在这格空。没有任何一家把"直接测量"塞进被动穿戴
专职劳动(螳格)次挤:觅蜂 Gripper、GenRobot Gripper/Dex、鹿明 FastUMI 全家、Generalist data hands——手持爪的主战场半只脚:灵初外骨骼手套(关节编码器直量,但"亚毫米"无验证)、GenRobot 的磁编码器通道(只量夹爪开口)——真正的混合设备只有这一家半
计量格(给上面所有数据当尺子、出误差账本)跨两列全空。七家无一人做。

每格的读法:蝉格和螳格已经是资本共识、多方混战,谁进去拼量谁当炮灰;measured 格只有零星的半只脚,说明"真值等级"还没被市场当卖点;计量格(我们 Anvil 仪器线+证书车道的家)扫完七家依然无人占据——而且这七家已经覆盖了中国融资最猛的五家、最大的巨头和美国估值最高的独立玩家,样本足够说明这是品类级空腔而非漏查。

2.2 资本与血统分层

  • 智元系: 觅蜂(75% 持股,板上钉钉)+ 灵初(媒体多源称智元为种子投资方,工商未核)。若灵初一条坐实,智元就是在对"卖铲人"赛道系统性全下注——所有非智元本体厂面对的将是一个到处参股的巨头,中立空腔反而更大。
  • 巨头系: 京东(部门自营,不融资,还反手投了 6 家本体公司)。巨头的特点是披露亮眼(有论文)但没人把身家押在上面。
  • 独立战投拼盘系: GenRobot(百度/Momenta/蚂蚁/滴滴)、鹿明(三菱/商汤/鼎晖)、它石(高瓴/红杉/美团)。共同点:产业资本既当股东又当(潜在)客户,判断"真付费"时都要打投资绑定的折扣。
  • 美国系: Generalist(NVIDIA/Bezos,$2B 估值)——垂直一体化到极致,设备锁自家院里,反而证明设备与证书的外部市场在美国也没人占。

2.3 宣称密度 vs 披露密度(谁最敢说、谁最敢证明)

"宣称密度"=对外喊的数字有多大多密;"披露密度"=拿得出多少可核验的证据。两个榜单并排看:

排名最敢说(宣称密度高→低)最敢证明(披露密度高→低)
1觅蜂(千万→百亿小时、1mm、一份通稿扇出约 25 家媒体,媒体链里还有已证伪的"29k stars")GenRobot(格式+开源+规格表三件套,3/5)
2京东(60 万人、千万小时、"涅槃计划"换人叙事)它石(论文+专利+吉尼斯,3/5)
3灵初("数据标准制定者"、亚毫米、年底营收"几个亿")京东(唯一的量化误差数字,2.5/5)
4鹿明("全球最高精度""全球最大真机数据集")灵初(真开源但硬件黑箱,2/5)
5它石(千万小时自称"bet",反而诚实)鹿明(唯一公开零售价,1/5)
6Generalist(physical AGI 叙事大,数字克制)Generalist(0.5/5)
7GenRobot(叙事最少)觅蜂(0/5)

两榜几乎完美倒挂:喊得最响的证明得最少(觅蜂两榜首尾对调),证明得最多的喊得最少(GenRobot)。唯一两榜都靠前的是京东和它石——巨头和"真机为主业"玩家反而敢交作业,因为它们的估值不押在采集宣称上;而把估值全押在数据故事上的公司,披露对它们是不对称风险(误差分布若不好看,就是自毁叙事)。这对我们意味着什么:v2 的 P2"披露即武器"被整个品类的倒挂结构验证——我们把误差分布做成随货交付物这件事,恰恰是宣称密度最高的那几家在结构上做不了的。

3. 对我们三车道的含义

对照 data-engine-v2 的三车道逐条互查(车道定义见该页 §1.3):

车道 1(计量院:随货误差分布+证书+中立化验)——空腔仍在,但 S3 情景已从假想变进行时。 威胁排序:京东最前(EgoLive 论文的 <8.75mm 量化误差就是 v2 §5.1 预警的"误差分布白皮书"第一步,虽然只是一次性论文快照,不是随货、不是周更、更不能审计别家);其次 GenRobot(开源文化最像会顺手发误差分布的一家,规格表里已有"<1cm"这种诚实数字);觅蜂/鹿明/灵初短期概率低(披露对其叙事是自毁)。潜在客户:恰恰是这七家的买家们——Generalist 的 Early Access 伙伴、京东商店和觅蜂货架上的数据采购方,将来想验货时市场上只有中立尺子可用;甚至七家本身在被买家逼问时也可能成为送检客户。矛盾如实报告:v2 写"觅蜂短期 <20%、京东中期中等"——京东一侧已部分应验,响应窗应按 v2 预案(≤4 周抢发跨厂商横评)压缩排期,这一点 v2 原文的概率表述已偏乐观。

车道 2(中立多本体)——空腔比 v2 写作时更大。 威胁:没有直接威胁者——鹿明自己卖本体,永远当不了中立方;京东投了 6 家本体厂,同样不中立;觅蜂被 75% 股权锁死。潜在客户:所有非智元系、非京东系的本体厂,现在要同时提防两个到处参股的巨头,天然客户名单变长。矛盾如实报告:v2 车道 2 的论证只建在"智元持股觅蜂"一条枷锁上;若灵初的智元种子股东传闻坐实(工商核验挂在观察哨),论证要从"防一家"改写成"防一个系",结论方向不变但地图要重画。

车道 3(开放格式+出海)——先发窗口实测比 v2 预估更窄。 威胁:GenRobot 已用 MCAP+MIT 工具把"开放格式"的前半段做掉了;它石的 wiyh2lerobot 桥接、灵初的 CC-BY-4.0 数据集也都是真开放动作——v2"开放本身零门槛、仅先发防御"的判断被三家同时验证,我们可守的只剩"开放格式+签名证书+Merkle 日志(防篡改的密码学账本)的耦合"。出海侧:Generalist 档案证实中文媒体对它零报道、它对设备零披露——美国市场的计量空腔和认知空腔同样空着,策略 #17 的独立辖区主体是进场前置条件而非优化项。潜在客户:美国买家在"中国数据商三重合规不可采购"的背景下,对中立认证的需求反而最刚性。矛盾如实报告:v2 把"零 SDK、零格式 spec"描述为品类通病——那是对着觅蜂一家写的,拿七家横评看已不成立(GenRobot/它石/灵初三家有真开放动作),该表述应限定主语,否则就是我们自己犯"宣称密度>披露密度"的毛病。

4. 全类别未知清单(行业级信息空腔)

以下是七家没有任何一家披露的东西——不是某家藏着,是整个品类集体空白:

  1. 随货误差分布。 没有一家把"这台设备这个固件版本的轨迹误差从小到大长什么样"作为交付物;最接近的京东也只是一次性论文快照。1mm/亚毫米/毫米级宣称满天飞,分布账本一份没有。
  1. 快门类型与同步实测。 七家没有一家说清相机是全局快门还是卷帘快门、多传感器对时是硬件触发还是软件对齐、残差实测多少;"亚毫秒同步"全部是说出来的数字,不是焊出来的事实。
  1. 真实成交价与付费客户。 除鹿明零售价和京东批发口径外,全品类无公开价目;具名付费数据客户全行业为零。
  1. 采集劳动实价。 只有京东宿迁月薪可折算(约 ¥30–50/h);众包/加盟/代工伙伴的工钱在七家全部成谜——而工资是这门生意的成本地板。
  1. 力/触觉通道的完备率。 觅蜂货架实测仅 8/467 条带触觉,是唯一能审计的样本;其余六家的力数据占比无从得知。"Day-1 触觉"是货架宣称不是货架事实。
  1. 独立第三方评测与拆机。 七家设备,零篇拆机、零份第三方评测、零个社区实测帖——买家的信息环境完全由厂商通稿构成。
  1. certify-the-certifier(谁来校验校验者)。 各家都在自评自己的数据质量,没有任何机制回答"质检本身准不准"——这是以上六条空腔的总根子,也是我们计量车道的开业理由。

这对我们意味着什么:这份清单就是我们规格表强制披露字段(v2 P2)的现成模板——行业空腔列一条,我们头版印一条。

5. 观察哨汇总

只收"触发我方动作"的哨点,七页去重合并,按日期排:

窗口哨点(出处档案)触发 → 我方动作
2026-07-17~20WAIC 上海:觅蜂 7/19"智启具身论坛";鹿明参展未确认(mifeng/luming)现场听口径分层;任何误差数据发布 → 启动 v2 §5.1 的 ≤4 周横评响应
2026-07-31鹿明 Project EDGE 100 台 NIX 免费申领截止(luming)观察领取机构名单——学术生态被锁定的速度,校准我们车道 3 的学术打法
2026-08 前灵初的智元股东工商核验;GenRobot das-datakit 5 个 issue 正文精读(lingchu/genrobot)前者坐实 → 车道 2 地图重画;后者是最便宜的真实集成痛点信号
2026-08-19~23WRC 北京,潜在新品/数据发布窗(mifeng)新闻扫描,同 WAIC 处理
月度觅蜂市场 API 轮询(基线 467,零增长中);HF JoyFutureAcademy 是否上架 EgoLive;灵初 SynData 下载曲线;Generalist 招聘页销售岗(mifeng/jd-data/lingchu/generalist)觅蜂目录跳增 → 重估 Gen-3 情景分支;EgoLive 免费化 → 预训练档价格锚下修;Generalist 出销售岗 → 美国商业化提速信号
每次迭代任何一家发布误差分布/第三方评测/校准白皮书(七页共同的头号哨)车道 1 空腔被占的直接信号,v2 §5.1 预案:报告周更化+跨厂商横评抢发,响应窗 ≤4 周
每次迭代具名付费数据客户首次出现(七页共同哨)全行业"真付费"问题首次有答案 → 定价锚与收入模型全面重估
2026-Q3它石苏州 15 台续约/扩台(morphic)扩台=真机内化数据引擎路线坐实,"卖铲给二线"错位定位维持
2026-Q4觅蜂 Gripper 拆机窗;它石 1,000 台兑现;鹿明 100 万小时产能证据;灵初服装仓储复购;Generalist 专利公开窗(申请后 18 个月)(mifeng/morphic/luming/lingchu/generalist)各家产能/订单叙事的第一批可证伪时点,集中复核一次、统一降档或升档
2027 内JoyEgoCam 专利公开窗(CNIPA 18 个月);宿迁 500 万小时一年期到期(2027-04/05)(jd-data)前者 → 评估我方 COTS 方案是否踩线;后者 → 人类视频档供给与价格走向判定

Sources

本页为纯汇编,事实出处全部为以下 7 张已通过对抗性核验的档案页(各页内含完整的一手/二手分级与外部链接):

  • case-mifeng — 觅蜂/Maniformer(智元系,已入 wiki)
  • case-genrobot — 简智新创/GenRobot
  • case-luming — 鹿明/Lumos Robotics
  • case-morphic — 它石智航/TARS
  • case-lingchu — 灵初/PsiBot
  • case-jd-data — 京东探索研究院具身数据业务
  • case-generalist — Generalist AI, Inc.(美国)

定位互查基准:data-engine-v2(三车道/度量衡定位;本页 §3 对其三处表述提出了修订建议)/ data-engine-first-principles(2×2 格位与公理基座,§2 引用)。

数据生意的底层 Pattern (The Patterns Behind the Robot-Data Gold Rush)

✓ 已核查更新 2026-07-12data-business-patterns

<!-- 对抗性核验 2026-07-12:~25 处具名证据行对 12 份档案逐一回源;已纠 12 处(它石订单"双源戳破"误归属、星海图 127万/ISO 单源未标、智元"完全不担心"引语挪用、京东"领投 6 家"升格、Applied Intuition 语料外类比、Zeng·RT-2 误归、速腾/滴滴客户-股东误列、¥100–1,000/h 计价口径混并、高继扬可信数据引语单源、GenRobot"飞轮"官网原文误标、灵初"2024 秋"、柴晓杰"15 年 L4"),H4 裁决补媒体误传对冲;其余抽查行(75% 控股/29k stars 证伪/467 条/±1.5mm/10万→199/143亿/4.5亿/15万小时/UR 借船/Levin/8.75mm/CC-BY 零上架/$340→$118/40+ 训练场/2026-11-30/蜂巢零文本/双榜倒挂/资本桌四行/四波日期)全部与档案一致。 -->

「说人话」:这一页回答老板的问题——"看到这么多公司组织在做这样的事情,你是否可以找到其背后的 pattern"。我们把 12 家已做过对抗性核验(即专门找茬式的事实核查)的公司放在一张桌上:觅蜂、GenRobot、鹿明、它石、灵初、京东、Generalist、松灵、帕西尼、光轮、星海图、Scale,横切出 8 个反复出现的结构,每个都给了反例和"到某天若不发生就算我说错"的可证伪推论。跟我们的数据引擎(data-engine-v2)的关系一句话:8 个 pattern 共同指向的空位仍是"没人做中立度量衡",但本页第 3 节给出一个扎心的裁决——空位空着的主因不是没人想到,而是今天还不存在为尺子付钱的买家,因此我们的车道 1 必须从"现在的收入线"诚实降级为"用器械收入养着的期权"。

本页只做模式归纳,全部事实出自文末 Sources 列出的已核档案页与横评页,不引入任何新的外部宣称;单家公司的证据分级、引语原文以各档案页为准。

1. Pattern 总表

#Pattern一句话证据(点名)反例可证伪推论(带日期)
P1AV 续集创始层与打法是自动驾驶(AV)数据闭环体系的整建制平移,但机器人没有 AV 那种免费产数据的部署车队,打法在"无本体卖数据"格位断裂它石陈亦伦(华为 ADS)、星海图高继扬(Waymo/Momenta)、GenRobot 陈建兴(Momenta 数据飞轮)、光轮谢晨(Cruise/NVIDIA)、觅蜂姚卯青(Waymo)、灵初柴晓杰(L4);高继扬亲口"1 块钱数据要 10 块钱算力"商业上最实的松灵(大疆系)、帕西尼(早稻田学术系)、鹿明(追觅系)恰恰全非 AV 系到 2027-12,觅蜂/GenRobot(无本体数据商)与灵初(手套+方案商)三家独立数据玩家至少一家被并购/合并回母系/转型器械商;三家若都以独立身份再融资且数据收入可查,P1 降权
P2双层收敛"头戴+手持爪+数据管线/货架"三件套在形态层是中美独立收敛(接近真理),在叙事层是同一批人的同一份剧本(模仿)觅蜂 MEgo 三件套、GenRobot DAS、京东 JoyEgoCam、它石 SenseHub、鹿明 FastUMI 与美国 Generalist data hands、Scale Harness 互不知晓地同构(中文媒体对 Generalist 零报道);但千万小时口径三家同窗口、觅蜂与京东同日 4/16 发布灵初(外骨骼手套)、帕西尼(触觉)、光轮(仿真)押了非收敛资产到 2027-06,三件套纯玩家至少一家数据货架被证实长期零增长并转向(觅蜂 API 基线 467 条 @2026-07,月度轮询在册);若三家货架都出现可验证第三方成交,"叙事模仿"判定下修
P3母体与国家买单12 家合计融资折数百亿人民币,但把出资人分成"锚定母体/国家/纯 VC/真外部买家"四类后,数据本身的具名付费买家全行业约等于一家(Scale)母体类:觅蜂←智元、京东←集团、GenRobot←蚂蚁股东、Scale←Meta 合同;国家类:觅蜂/灵初/星海图/光轮/帕西尼/京东全有国资层;纯 VC 且数据侧零具名客户:Generalist(零收入)、它石(15 台真机部署是卖机器人且客户匿名);真外部具名:仅 Scale(PI、Generalist 署名)吉利同时是帕西尼与光轮(经 NVIDIA)的可交叉客户——但买的是"能干活"不是数据;三菱付真金给鹿明——买的是机器人帕西尼若按彭博口径 2026–27 递表港股,招股书将显示客户集中度表中股东关联方过半或数据收入占比 <10%;若独立数据收入成规模,P3 作废
P4铲子有价、金子无市唯一被验证的单位经济是器械/传感器零售;深圳成本坍缩在器件层如期重演,但穿不透数据小时层——小时的地板是工资不是 BOM(物料清单,即硬件的件料成本)松灵九年硬件流水、2021 后不再融资;帕西尼传感器 10 万元→¥199(约 500×)+7 个商城硬价;鹿明 LUS2 京东直卖;对照:遥操作两年只降 65%($340→$118/h),中国采集零工 ¥30–50/h 已贴工资地板Scale 2025 交付 15 万+小时是真服务营收(但合并报表拆不出);光轮自报 2025 营收破 ¥1 亿(未审计)到 2027-06,UMI 类手持爪出现 <¥5,000 公开零售价,但无一家把数据挂牌价降到 ¥100/h 以下;任一半落空即修正。到 2027-Q2,品类第一条审计级盈利线是器械零售而非数据销售
P5柠檬均衡没有质量尺子的市场里(柠檬市场:买家无法验货,劣币驱良币),宣称与披露完美倒挂、价格连计价单位都不统一且散成数倍带宽、"小时数"成了不可审计的融资抵押物宣称/披露双榜倒挂(觅蜂两榜首尾对调、GenRobot 相反);价格无质量计量仲裁:小时计价 ¥200–1,000+/h 与按条计价(鹿明 ¥100/百条)并存,无换算口径;抵押物:觅蜂千万→百亿小时对 467 条静止货架、星海图"127.3 万小时"+张冠李戴 ISO 编号(两者均单源 aimaoxian,证券时报同场报道口径仅为"百万小时计划",存量 (unverified))、光轮中英文订单口径不对账、灵初订单被双源报"公关性质"有非数据现金流或估值不押数据的公司不通胀小时数:松灵、Scale(收入不单列)、京东(出资方)、它石(自称"bet")到 2027-06 若无第三方横评落地,无一家自愿发布按固件版本的误差分布;若行标/高校横评出现,预测披露最高的 GenRobot/京东最先送检、觅蜂/鹿明最后——顺序颠倒即证伪
P6开放 ≠ 计量开源密度与计量披露零相关:开源买的是生态位与获客,不自动产生可审计性松灵 92 仓库、光轮 16 仓+2053 万帧、GenRobot MIT 工具链、灵初 AAAI 真代码——全部在误差分布/同步残差上交白卷,与全黑箱的 Generalist 相同;Scale 的 GM 本人是 LeRobot 核心建设者,Scale 机器人开源足迹却为零京东 EgoLive 论文是唯一把开放宣称与量化误差放在一起的——但 HF 实际零上架到 2026-Q4,开源活跃度前三(松灵/光轮/GenRobot)无一家发布同步残差或误差分布实测;若有,我们车道 3 "开放+证书耦合"表述需升级
P7收编终局数据层不被允许独立:本体厂与平台巨头正在系统性收编"卖铲人"的股权与人才,预演 AV 终局(数据一旦成为护城河就被垂直整合者内化)智元 75% 控股觅蜂+疑似种子投资竞对灵初(媒体多源,工商未核);京东自营之外对外投资 6 家本体/零部件公司,另战略领投帕西尼;Meta $143 亿买 Scale 49%、创始人离场;NVIDIA 同时坐 Generalist 股东席、光轮 Newton 共建席、Scale F 轮,又挖走 Scale 机器人 GM Levin松灵无任何巨头股权枷锁;Generalist/它石垂直自用尚未被控股到 2027-12,智元系/京东系/蚂蚁系至少一家完成对组合内数据公司的合并或业务回收;若三系组合全部独立运营且各自完成外部融资,P7 降为噪声
P8脉冲与断裂顺序成立时点聚成四波、每波跟在政策/模型事件后 3–9 个月;一旦资金气候转向,断裂将按退出成本从低到高发生:仪式签约→展示采购→数据货架→众包零工→无现金流纯数据商2023 波(光轮/星海图)、2024 波(Generalist/它石壳/鹿明/灵初)、2025 波(GenRobot/Scale 事业部)、2026 波(觅蜂/京东/亦数智能,形态变成分拆合资);断裂前两环已有裂纹:蜂巢共创行动零运营文本、灵初订单"公关性质"双源底子最实的松灵(2017)、帕西尼(2021)、Scale(2016)是老公司顺延而非浪潮儿;国资介入可能让中国版转向表现为"僵而不死"MIIT 实训专项 2026-11-30 交卷;2027-H1 若 40+ 国营训练场出现 ≥5 家可查关停/缩编,且死亡名单里无一家有硬件零售现金流,P8 成立;若先死的是松灵/帕西尼型,作废

批判读法(完整句子): 这张表串起来是一句话——收敛是真的(形态)也是假的(剧本);付钱的是母体和国家,不是市场;能收到钱的是铲子不是金子;价格散成十倍带宽因为没有尺子;而尺子空着的原因,第 3 节单独裁决。这对我们意味着什么:8 个 pattern 没有一个否定"度量衡空位存在",但 P3+P5 联手否定了"度量衡今天就能收钱"。

2. 逐条展开

P1 AV 续集:同一批人执导,但缺了关键道具

白话解释: 自动驾驶行业 2016–2021 年建立了一套"数据闭环"打法(车队跑在路上免费产生数据→回传→训练→更好的车→更多数据)。现在这批操盘手集体转行做机器人数据,把整套话术和组织搬了过来。问题是:机器人没有"已经跑在路上的车队",每一小时数据都要专门雇人制造,成本地板从零变成了工资。

证据: 12 家中 6 家创始层直接出自 AV 量产数据体系,且拿走了融资额最高的席位——它石创始团队几乎全部出自华为 ADS/百度 Apollo 体系(陈亦伦、李震宇、丁文超、陈同庆),星海图高继扬历经 Waymo→Momenta、在 Momenta 带过百人团队,GenRobot 陈建兴在 Momenta 的岗位就是"数据飞轮量产",光轮谢晨搬的是 Cruise/NVIDIA 仿真管线,觅蜂姚卯青出自 Waymo,灵初柴晓杰有 15 年机器人+自动驾驶经历、做过 L4 落地与数据闭环。话术同样平移:"闭环、持续加速的数据服务"(GenRobot 官网逐字;"飞轮"一词是其 Momenta 血统的模式匹配,档案标 (unverified))、"自动驾驶替具身智能踩了巨坑"(它石陈亦伦,媒体转述)、"具身数据需求至少是自动驾驶的 1000 倍"(光轮总裁杨海波,新京报专访)。而断裂也被 AV 老兵自己说破:高继扬"1 块钱数据要 10 块钱算力才训得明白",姚卯青承认无本体数据有效性"还在探索中"。

反例与边界: playbook 只在"无本体采集卖数据"这个格位断裂——光轮平移最成功(AV 仿真本来就不需要车队),它石用"卖真机→真机在岗回传"重建了微型车队闭环(苏州 15 台在岗)。且商业上最实的三家(松灵、帕西尼、鹿明)全非 AV 系:AV 血统买到的是融资速度,不是收入。

这对我们意味着什么: 我们不必跟 AV 系拼融资叙事,他们的短板(没有车队、数据必须制造)正是器械生意的需求来源——谁制造数据,谁就需要采集器械。

P2 双层收敛:形态是真理,剧本是模仿

白话解释: 中美两边没有交流,却长出了几乎一样的产品组合(被动头戴记录人干活+手持采集爪+数据处理管线),这说明"人类示范是最便宜的数据矿"接近客观真理。但"千万小时产能""数据货架/交易所""数据飞轮融资故事"这些打法层的雷同,是同一批 AV 老兵抄同一份剧本。两层要分开计价:形态可信,剧本存疑。

证据: 形态层——觅蜂 MEgo View/Gripper/Engine、GenRobot DAS Ego/Gripper、京东 JoyEgoCam、它石 SenseHub、鹿明 FastUMI,与美国 Generalist "data hands"、Scale Harness、光轮 EgoSuite 同构,而 Generalist 档案证实中文媒体对它零报道——是独立收敛不是互抄。剧本层——觅蜂、京东、它石三家的千万小时目标同量级同窗口,觅蜂与京东同日(2026-04-16)发布。

反例与边界: 灵初(外骨骼手套)、帕西尼(触觉单模态)、光轮(仿真主业)押了非收敛资产,收敛不是全员的。

这对我们意味着什么: 我们清洁室推导出同款形态(data-engine-first-principles)这件事被双岸独立收敛第三次背书——形态没赌错;要警惕的是别把剧本层的口径(小时数、货架)也当成真理跟进。

P3 母体与国家买单:市场还不存在

白话解释: 表面上这是个百亿融资的热闹市场,但顺着钱往下摸,"数据"这个商品的真实买家几乎找不到——付钱的要么是自家母公司/股东(左手买右手),要么是政府(买的是产能、就业和政绩叙事),真正掏钱买数据的陌生外部客户,全行业只有美国 Scale 能拿出署名案例。

证据: 母体/股东即客户:觅蜂(智元下单 ¥1,000+/h)、京东(集团自营)、GenRobot(蚂蚁灵波=Pre-A 股东)、鹿明(三菱=A 轮领投,且买的是机器人)、帕西尼(BYD/京东/TCL/商汤客户股东几乎全重叠)、Scale(Meta 年付 ≥$4.5 亿撑起半个收入)。国家侧:觅蜂(国方+贵州+张江)、灵初(徐汇资本+石景山数采厂)、星海图(亦庄政府合资)、光轮(北京 AI 产业基金+多路国资)、帕西尼(南山战新投+天津工厂)、京东(宿迁市政府)。灵初的订单被两家独立媒体(钛媒体+36氪)指为"更像展示采购/公关性质";它石的苏州 15 台是真部署(客户匿名),但"1,000 台订满"口径无法拆验(《财经》:尚未完全交付);光轮 ¥5.5 亿 Q1 订单不点名且中英文口径不对账。

反例与边界: GenRobot 几乎无国资、纯市场化融资——国资层是普遍项非必要条件;Scale 的 PI/Generalist 署名背书是真的,但其中 Cobot 系是前 CTO 自己人。

这对我们意味着什么: 收入模型绝不能建在"数据买家已验证"上——这是 data-companies-compare §1 结论在 12 家样本上的再确认,也是第 3 节裁决的前提。

P4 铲子有价、金子无市

白话解释: 这场淘金热里,唯一被验证赚到钱的方式是卖工具(采集器、传感器、机器人本体),而"数据本身当商品卖"至今全行业零笔可验证交易。器件价格在按深圳规律暴跌(五年百倍),但数据小时的价格降不下去,因为里面装的是人的工资。

证据: 松灵靠底盘+割草机活了九年、2021 后不再融资(创始人原话:"这要看你是想把这件事情做成一份事业,还是一门生意");帕西尼触觉传感器 10 万元→¥199、商城 7 个硬价格;鹿明 LUS2 ¥19.9 万京东直卖;星海图 R1 Lite ¥19.9 万有售。对照:京东数据毛利纸面极厚(¥30–50/h 人力对 ¥200/h 批发)但零具名买家——毛利是假设的;遥操作两年只降 65%,每个能力量级需 10× 小时、成本只降 2–3×(data-scaling-strategy 口径)。许晋诚说破结构:"做了人形机器人,别人才了解你触觉传感器的能力"——整机是道具,可标价的器械才是生意。

反例与边界: Scale 的 15 万+小时交付是真服务收入(拆不出单列数);光轮自报营收破亿(未审计)。

这对我们意味着什么: v2 "器械生意不依赖数据买家"的顺序被第 N 次坐实,且强度升级——器械不只是"先行",它可能是 2026–27 唯一的收入形态。

P5 柠檬均衡:没有尺子的市场长什么样

白话解释: 经济学里的"柠檬市场"指买家无法分辨好坏时,吹牛零成本、诚实反而吃亏。这个行业的三个怪象——喊得最响的证明得最少、数据定价连计价单位都不统一(小时计价从京东 ≈¥200/h 到无本体 >¥1,000/h,鹿明则按条卖 ¥100/百条,无任何换算或质量校准)没人觉得奇怪、"累计小时数"成了融资时的抵押物(不可审计、通胀零成本、可直接兑换估值)——全是同一个均衡的三张脸。

证据: 宣称/披露倒挂:觅蜂宣称密度第 1、披露 0/5(含已证伪的 29k stars,实测 3,089);GenRobot 叙事最少、披露 3/5。抵押物榜:觅蜂千万→百亿小时对 467 条静止货架;星海图"127.3 万小时"+张冠李戴 ISO 编号("ISO/IEC 23053:2024 具身数据合规认证"——真标准是 2022 版 ML 术语框架,与合规无关;两者均只见于 aimaoxian 单源,证券时报同场报道口径是"百万小时计划",存量数字 (unverified)、编号是公司说的还是媒体抄错的未定);光轮 ¥5.5 亿 vs "~$100M"两套口径;灵初 95,472 小时自报对"公关性质订单"双源报道;Generalist 27 万→50 万小时 scaling 曲线就是融资叙事本体($2B 估值/零收入)。对照组共性:有非数据现金流或估值锚的公司(松灵、Scale、京东、它石)不通胀小时数——通胀度与融资依赖度正相关,坐实抵押物假说。

反例与边界: 京东给出全品类唯一量化误差(<8.75mm)却同时"CC-BY 宣称 vs HF 零上架"——倒挂是连续谱不是二元;觅蜂给过唯一的价格动力学预期("行业收敛后降至真机 1/2–1/3"),但那是产能故事不是质量定价。

这对我们意味着什么: P2 "披露即武器"被整个品类的倒挂结构验证——我们把误差分布做成随货交付物,恰恰是估值押在宣称上的公司结构上做不了的事;但注意第 3 节:武器有效不等于武器今天有人付钱。

P6 开放 ≠ 计量

白话解释: 直觉上"最开源的公司应该最可信",但语料显示开源和可审计是两种不同的货币:开源买的是开发者生态和获客,误差账本一分钱都买不到。

证据: 松灵开源 92 个仓库却不公布 Pika ±1.5mm 的任何实证;光轮开源 16 仓+2053 万帧却对"亚毫米/kHz"物理求解器零第三方复测;帕西尼开源管线但数据集用 NC 许可圈地;GenRobot MIT 工具链但无误差分布;Scale 机器人 GM 本人是 LeRobot 核心建设者,Scale 的机器人开源足迹为零。

反例与边界: 京东 EgoLive 论文是唯一把开放宣称与量化误差并置的——但实际零上架,反例本身又有缺口。

这对我们意味着什么: 车道 3 "可守的不是开放本身,而是开放格式+签名证书+Merkle 日志的耦合"再获一票;单做开源是给别人修路。

P7 收编终局:数据层不被允许独立

白话解释: 上游平台和本体巨头不在赌哪家数据公司赢,而在确保无论谁赢、数据层都归自己:参股所有玩家、挖走关键人才、把数据平台注入合资公司。这正是 AV 行业的终局(数据一旦成为护城河,车厂就把数据团队收回体内)的前置阵型。

证据: 智元 75% 控股觅蜂、疑似又是竞对灵初的种子股东(sina 正文逐字+多源媒体,工商未核);京东自营数据部门之外对外投资 6 家本体/零部件公司(2025-05~08),另战略领投帕西尼一轮融资;星海图把数据平台以永久授权注入政府合资公司;Meta $143 亿买走 Scale 49%、创始人 Wang 离场,机器人业务缔造者 Levin 又被 NVIDIA 挖走且无继任者;NVIDIA 同时坐在 Generalist 股东席、光轮 Newton 共建席与 Scale F 轮里。

反例与边界: 松灵是唯一无平台股权枷锁的在位器械商;美国侧 NVIDIA 走吸人才+生态绑定而非控股。

这对我们意味着什么: 中立空腔随收编扩大——被收编的每一家都失去当"中立质检方"的资格;同时警示我们自己:Quectel 系身份的主体拆分(策略 #17)是前置条件,否则我们在买家眼里同样不中立。

P8 脉冲与断裂顺序

白话解释: 这些公司不是随机时间成立的,而是聚在四个政策/模型事件后的 3–9 个月里(2023 大模型冲击、2024 MIIT 指导意见、2025 具身智能进政府工作报告、2026 十五五+实训行动);同理,当补贴和融资转向,倒下的顺序也可排:最先断的是零违约成本的签约仪式,最后断的是发工资的实体。

证据: 四波:光轮 2023-01/星海图 2023-09;Generalist 2024-03/它石壳 2024-07/鹿明 2024-09/灵初 2024 秋;它石正式 2025-02/GenRobot 2025-05/Scale 事业部 2025-09;觅蜂 2026-02/京东发布 2026-04-16/亦数智能 2026-06-16(2026 波的形态特征是分拆/合资——数据故事被单独剥出来估值)。断裂前两环已有裂纹:蜂巢共创行动无任何运营文本;灵初生态合作被原报道作者标注"零商业细节"、订单双源报"展示采购";三个数据货架(觅蜂/京东/星海图)全部无自然增长证据。抗跌侧:松灵有消费现金流、帕西尼有零售+IPO 通道、京东可无声收缩、它石有 15 台真机。

反例与边界: 国资深度介入可能让中国版转向表现为"僵而不死"而非美式清盘——顺序不变,日历拉长。

这对我们意味着什么: 2026-12(MIIT 专项到期)是品类第一个集中清算点;我们的现金流设计必须假设"届时数据侧买家为零"仍能活,而器械销售恰好满足该假设。

3. 「度量衡为什么空置」专节(自我批判核心)

这是对我们自己最重要的一节。12 家融资团队、合计数百亿,没有一家做计量/证书(给数据配可核验误差账本的"质检院")。为什么?四个假说,拿语料逐一裁决:

H1「太早/没人想到」——最弱。 反证充分:京东发了带量化误差的论文(<8.75mm,算法指名)、GenRobot 规格表诚实写"<1cm"、光轮做了模型层考试院 RoboFinals、高继扬被引"不是数据不够,而是可信数据太少"(单源,(unverified),但其已核的"采数据是为了搞智能"同向)——意识普遍存在,是想到了而不做。H1 唯一残值在需求侧:12 家零拆机、零第三方评测、Reddit/HN 对 Scale/Generalist 零讨论——买家也没吵着要尺子,这个意义上确实"早"。

H2「结构上不赚钱」——最强。 证书是数据市场的二阶衍生品,而 P3 已证一阶市场(数据买卖本身)近乎不存在——没有买家的市场,不需要验货员。今天真正付钱的两类人都不需要证书:锚定母体走市场化下单、档案里查不到任何第三方验收/质检条款(智元对觅蜂"唯一途径就是市场化下订单",无验收环节记录),国家买的是产能/就业/叙事 KPI(宿迁 60 万人动员目标、天津 150 工位、亦庄揭牌),不是精度。最重的一锤来自最成熟的玩家:Scale 做保真档数据时借用 UR 的现成计量体系而不自建("借船出海")——年入十亿美元的公司也没把计量当值得自建的资产(动机是我们的推断,行为是档案事实)。

H3「与融资叙事冲突,披露是不对称风险」——对在位者成立。 宣称/披露倒挂(P5)是直接证据:估值押在采集宣称上的(觅蜂 1mm 零验证、鹿明"1mm 全球最高" vs 学术版实测 10.5–24.1mm、灵初"亚毫米" vs 36氪厘米级天花板)披露最少;估值不押在此的(京东、它石)反而敢交论文和专利。但 H3 只解释在位者不做,解释不了为什么没有新团队被投来做——那要靠 H2 加 H4。

H4「计量的位置已被标准政治以更低成本占据」。 中国生态里,"谁说了算"的租金正被参编标准捕获而非被工程计量捕获——觅蜂发布会拉国家数据标委会+赛迪站台、光轮宣称参编 20 项标准(单源,(unverified);但二号位确是前政府标准化官员,结构自洽)、星海图拉政府合资讲"监管可查审计流水"、灵初自称"数据标准制定者"却连误差分布都没有。最露骨的一条证据是星海图发布链里的张冠李戴 ISO 编号——但要诚实标出:该编号仅见单一媒体来源,是公司所说还是媒体抄错未能钉死;若属媒体之误,H4 的最强单证降级,H4 整体降为与 H3 并列而非其上(下方裁决已按此处理)。即便打完这个折扣,方向仍成立:媒体链里能长出不存在的认证编号而无人纠错,说明认证的表演需求已经存在,认证的实体供给没有。开会比建台架便宜,而在当前买家结构下二者兑换同样的信用。

裁决:H2 > H3 ≈ H4 > H1。 必须说透最强项的含义:2026 年不存在为"数据证书"付钱的独立买家,车道 1 作为独立收入线在今天没有市场——这不是执行问题,是市场时序问题。

对 data-engine-v2 的修订判决(不护旧结论):

  1. 计量降级为随货特性,不是独立 SKU。 误差分布报告的定位从"车道 1 的头版产品"改为"器械的随货差异化"——它帮我们把 Mantis/Cicada 卖得更贵更快,但不单独收钱。近期收入 100% 挂在 P4 唯一被验证的品类(器械零售)上。
  1. 证书 SaaS 显式标记为 2027+ 期权,不再进近期收入模型。 v2 原文"证书先于语料"的顺序保留(第九次被坐实),但"证书"从收入线降为期权——比 v2 原文更硬的降级。
  1. 期权的行权触发是外生的,列成明确清单: ① 第一笔具名外部数据交易出现(全行业哨);② 监管强制(帕西尼 IPO 招股书披露、跨境合规要求);③ H4 的表演性认证暴雷(下一个假 ISO 被公开戳穿,表演与实体的价差瞬间打开)。届时实体计量要 2–3 个季度仪器基建才能供货,所以 Anvil 台架照建、月度报告照发——建是为了行权时在场,不是为了今天收钱。
  1. v2 §1.3 "三车道中只有车道 1 有真护城河"的表述维持,但资源配比反转: 护城河最深的车道拿最少的近期资源(维持仪器活的最小编制),现金流车道(器械)拿最多。

这对我们意味着什么(一句话): 尺子是对的,时候是错的;用铲子的钱养着尺子,盯着三个外生触发器,触发即加注。

4. 时间线与谱系图(文字版)

4.1 成立/入场四波脉冲

波次触发事件3–9 个月内成立/入场
2023 波RT-2/大模型冲击光轮 2023-01、星海图 2023-09
2024 波MIIT 2023-11《指导意见》Generalist 2024-03、它石壳公司 2024-07、鹿明 2024-09、灵初 2024 末(首笔天使 2024-11,注册日未入档)
2025 波2025-03 具身智能首进政府工作报告它石正式 2025-02、GenRobot 注册 2025-05、Scale Physical AI 事业部 2025-09
2026 波十五五规划+实训行动觅蜂注册 2026-02-03、京东全链发布 2026-04-16(与觅蜂同日)、亦数智能揭牌 2026-06-16;形态特征:分拆/合资,数据故事被单独剥出估值
波外(老公司顺延)—松灵 2017(底盘)、帕西尼 2021(传感器)、Scale 2016(LLM 标注)——恰是交付最实的三家

4.2 创始人谱系表

谱系公司(创始人)
AV 量产/数据闭环它石(陈亦伦·华为 ADS CTO/李震宇·Apollo/丁文超/陈同庆)、星海图(高继扬·Waymo→Momenta/赵行·Waymo)、GenRobot(陈建兴·小鹏→Momenta)、光轮(谢晨·NVIDIA/Cruise)、觅蜂(姚卯青·Waymo)、灵初(柴晓杰·L4,半席)
大疆硬件/竞赛系松灵(魏基栋、谭柱)
学术硬件系帕西尼(许晋诚·早稻田)、鹿明(丁琰·Fast-UMI 作者;喻超·追觅)
大厂实验室论文系Generalist(Florence·DeepMind PaLM-E/RT-2 合著、Zeng·Google Brain/DeepMind TossingBot 与 PaLM-SayCan、Barry·波士顿动力)
巨头部门/平台延伸京东(何晓冬·微软 15 年)、Scale(Wang·YC;机器人线 Levin·LeRobot 建设者,已被 NVIDIA 挖走)

计数:Waymo 出现 3 次、Momenta 2 次、华为 ADS 一家占 3 人、大疆 2 次。AV 系拿走融资最高席位;非 AV 系拿走可验证收入。

4.3 资本桌重复下注表

机构下注(次数)
红杉中国觅蜂(种子领投)、它石(Pre-A 联合领投)、松灵(A 轮)——3 次
高瓴创投它石(天使+Pre-A)、灵初(天使领投)、星海图——3 次
蚂蚁GenRobot(Pre-A)、光轮(战略轮领投)、星海图(A 轮独家)+经灵波当 GenRobot"客户"——3 投 1 单
美团它石(天使+领投)、星海图(龙珠)——2 次
NVIDIAGeneralist(股东)、Scale(F 轮)、光轮(Newton 共建)+挖走 Scale 的 Levin
客户-股东一体三菱(鹿明)、BYD/京东/TCL/商汤(帕西尼)、蚂蚁经灵波(GenRobot)、Meta(Scale 49%)
国资层觅蜂/灵初/星海图/光轮/帕西尼/京东全有;美国对照组为零

这对我们意味着什么: 同一批机构在扫赛道、同一批股东在当客户——尽调任何"客户公告"前先查股东表,已成为本 wiki 的固定动作。

5. 历史类比裁决

四个候选类比,逐一裁决:

  1. AV 数据产业 2016–2021(主类比,拟合最高)。 人事层每家操盘手都是 AV 数据线出身(§4.2),话术层"飞轮/闭环/小时数 KPI"全套平移。断点: AV 的边际数据是已售车队的免费尾气,机器人数据要专职制造,成本地板是工资(Waymo 真幂律+50 万小时+真收入还爬了十五年——本品类连幂律证据都还没有)。该类比的终局预测: 数据被垂直整合者内化、独立数据商消失——P7 显示前置阵型已就位;预测到 2027-12 至少一家无本体独立数据商被并购/回收/转型(与 P1 推论同款)。
  1. 数据标注/Scale 产业(子层类比)。 "谁是具身的 Scale"是中文媒体现成框架,broker vs vertical 的分野已复现。断点: 标注业加工的是免费原料(网上爬来的文本图像),这里原料本身要制造;且原型自己没跑通——Scale 机器人收入从不单列、灵魂人物出走无继任。
  1. 手机 ODM/山寨波(器件层子类比,半场成立)。 帕西尼 500× 降价、鹿明/松灵/星海图上电商零售、开源 SDK 当获客——"公板+电商+价格战"三件套齐活。断点: 曲线穿不透数据小时层(工资地板),所以是"半场山寨波"。
  1. 淘金热(最流行,拟合最差)。 1849 年金子是真的、有现货价;这里"金子"(付费数据买家)查无实据,且人人自称卖铲(觅蜂与灵初的卖铲话术几乎逐字撞车)——人人卖铲,即卖铲已成新的淘金,铲子往往卖给其他卖铲人的股东。

裁决:AV 续集为主框架,标注业与山寨波各解释一个子层,淘金热仅作修辞慎用。 综合终局预测(带日期):2026-12 补贴/融资双日历到期 → 2027-H1 按 P8 顺序逐环断裂(仪式先死、工资单后死)→ 2027-12 前至少一起平台对数据公司的合并/回收 → 幸存者形态是"器械商+垂直自用者+巨头内部部门",独立数据货架商这个物种大概率消失。留给独立玩家的结构性空位始终只有一个:计量/认证格——而所有在位者的股权表恰恰保证了他们做不了。

这对我们意味着什么: 我们的对标不该是任何一家数据公司,而是 AV 时代活下来的工具/仿真商那类"卖工作流不卖故事"的活法(corpus 内最近的实例是光轮把 AV 仿真管线平移成活到今天的产品线);类比链条里"工具商+计量期权"是唯一没被历史证伪的组合。

6. 对设计栈的修订指令

  1. data-engine-v2 §1.3: 车道 1 定位从"主车道(计量院)"改注为"主护城河、非主收入线";新增本页 §3 的四条修订判决(计量随货化、证书 SaaS 2027+ 期权化、外生触发清单、资源配比反转)。
  1. data-engine-v2 §3 Gen-1 表: Anvil 行补注——台架照建、月报照发,定位为"行权在场费"而非产品线;Mantis/Cicada 的误差分布报告改标"随货差异化特性(不单独计价)"。
  1. data-engine-v2 §5 风险表: 新增 H4 风险行——"表演性认证占位":若 CAICT 或标委会推出无实测的具身数据'认证',短期内会吸走我们潜在客户的合规预算;对策是横评抢发+等暴雷。
  1. data-scaling-strategy: 杠铃纪律补注 P8 断裂顺序——2026-12 前不签任何依赖"数据侧买家出现"的承诺;现金流压力测试按"数据收入=0 至 2027-H2"跑。
  1. data-companies-compare: 下次刷新时把 7 家扩为 12 家(纳入松灵/帕西尼/光轮/星海图/Scale 批次二档案),§2.2 血统分层升级为本页 §4.3 资本桌表。
  1. 新增固定动作(写入 LOOP.md 观察哨节奏): 任何"客户公告"入档前先查股东表重叠(P3);任何"小时数"入档时标注融资依赖度(P5 抵押物判据)。
  1. case-paxini 入 wiki 时: 招股书哨点升格为品类级——它是全行业第一份强制披露的财务文本,P3/P5/H2 三个 pattern 的最强检验器。
  1. 对外口径(修订指令 #15 升级): 永不裸用"卖铲人"框架(已与灵初/觅蜂几乎逐字撞车,P2 剧本层);统一口径为"器械商,持有计量期权"。

7. 观察哨(pattern 级哨点)

窗口哨点检验的 pattern → 触发动作
2026-11-30MIIT 实训专项交卷P8:2027-H1 起数国营训练场关停/缩编数;≥5 家且无硬件现金流公司先死 → P8 成立,现金流假设维持
2026-12觅蜂 /api/data total 是否仍 <1,000 条且其间再官宣融资P5 抵押物:货架与融资脱钩的直接观测
2026-Q4它石 1,000 台兑现、鹿明 100 万小时、觅蜂 Gripper 拆机窗P5/P6:第一批产能叙事集中清算,统一升降档
2026-27帕西尼港股招股书(彭博口径:未来数月递表)P3+H2 最强检验器:预测客户集中度股东重叠过半、数据收入占比 <10%、零第三方精度计量;任一反向 → 对应 pattern 重大修正
持续Scale×UR 2026 联合数据集的许可条款H2 推论:第一单真实计量需求出现在跨境交易而非中国国内
持续下一个表演性认证暴雷(假 ISO 类)H4 行权触发器之一 → 车道 1 期权加注窗,响应预案 ≤4 周
每次迭代具名外部付费数据客户首次出现(全 corpus 共同哨)P3 的答案时刻 → 定价锚、收入模型、车道 1 期权全面重估
2026-08 前灵初的智元种子股东工商核验P7:坐实 → "一个系收编一条赛道"升级为已核事实,车道 2 地图重画
2027-06是否有任何一家发布按固件版本误差分布;UMI 爪是否出现 <¥5,000 零售价;数据挂牌价是否跌破 ¥100/hP4/P5/P6 三连检验:器件坍缩+工资地板+柠檬均衡
2027-12觅蜂/GenRobot/灵初三家独立性;三大平台系是否完成合并/回收P1/P7 终局检验

8. 没搞清楚的

  1. 12 家之外还有多少同类玩家没进样本。 查过:corpus 覆盖了中国融资最猛的几家、最大巨头、美国估值最高的独立玩家与最成熟的标注商——样本代表性够裁决品类级 pattern,但二三线采集作坊(尤其国营训练场里的运营方)没有档案,P8 断裂顺序的第四环(众包零工)证据最薄。为什么可能查不到:这类主体不融资不发通稿,公开足迹近零。
  1. 智元对灵初的种子股权。 查过:多家媒体提及但工商未核,挂 2026-08 前核验哨。为什么可能查不到:代持或经关联基金持股在公开工商系统里可以完全隐形。
  1. Scale 机器人业务的真实收入与毛利。 查过:15 万+小时交付是可信的,但合并在约 $10 亿总收入里从不单列。为什么可能查不到:私有公司无披露义务,且 Meta 交易后更无动机拆分。
  1. 政府侧采购里"数据"与"产能/就业"的真实配比。 查过:通稿只有工位数、人数、揭牌照;没有一份政府侧合同写明按数据质量验收。为什么可能查不到:政府采购公告的验收条款通常不公开,除非进入招投标公示或审计报告。
  1. H2 与 H3 的相对权重是否会随一份招股书翻转。 帕西尼招股书是唯一确定日历上的强制披露事件;若它显示数据收入成规模,本页 §3 的整个裁决要重写。这是本页最大的单点脆弱性,如实标出。

Sources

本页为纯模式归纳,零新增外部宣称;全部事实出自以下已核档案与横评页(各页内含一手/二手分级与外部链接):

  • case-mifeng — 觅蜂/Maniformer(智元系)
  • case-genrobot — 简智新创/GenRobot
  • case-luming — 鹿明/Lumos
  • case-morphic — 它石智航/TARS
  • case-lingchu — 灵初/PsiBot
  • case-jd-data — 京东具身数据
  • case-generalist — Generalist AI(美国)
  • case-agilex / case-paxini / case-lightwheel / case-galaxea / case-scale — 松灵、帕西尼、光轮、星海图、Scale(批次二档案)
  • data-companies-compare — 七家横评(2×2 格位、宣称/披露双榜)
  • data-foundry — 单位经济与国营训练场底数
  • data-collection-devices — 中国生态器件层
  • data-scaling-strategy — 杠铃纪律、AV 基率、成本曲线
  • data-engine-v2 — 三车道定位(本页 §3/§6 对其提出修订判决)
  • landscape-china — 政策节(MIIT 实训行动、EV playbook)

Key People

✓ 已核查更新 2026-07-04key-people

The Physical AI field is driven by a small, densely connected set of people: academic researchers who co-founded foundation-model startups (Sergey Levine, Chelsea Finn, Deepak Pathak), corporate lab leaders (Jim Fan and Yuke Zhu at NVIDIA GEAR, Carolina Parada at Google DeepMind, Pieter Abbeel at Amazon), and founder-executives racing to commercialize humanoids (Brett Adcock/Figure, Bernt Børnich/1X, Wang Xingxing/Unitree, Peng Zhihui/AgiBot). 2024–2026 saw heavy churn: the Google robotics diaspora seeded most US robot-foundation-model startups, Amazon absorbed Covariant's founders, Tesla and Boston Dynamics changed program leaders, and several high-profile executives (Robert Playter, Caitlin Kalinowski, Eric Jang, Milan Kovac) exited as the field shifted from research to deployment.

Researchers and AI lab leaders

PersonAffiliation (as of 2026-07)Known forNotable moves 2024–2026
Sergey LevineUC Berkeley (BAIR/RAIL) + co-founder, Physical IntelligenceDeep RL for robotics (Soft Actor-Critic, offline RL), Open X-Embodiment/RT-X, π-series VLA modelsCo-founded Physical Intelligence (announced 2024-03); co-authored π0 (2024-10), π0.5 (2025-04), π0.7 (2026-04), which he says shows capabilities scaling "more than linearly with data" once skill remixing emerges
Chelsea FinnStanford (IRIS lab) + co-founder, Physical IntelligenceMAML meta-learning; lab produced ALOHA / Mobile ALOHA low-cost teleop hardware and the DROID dataset (Data)Co-founded Physical Intelligence 2024; core author on the π model line through π0.7 (2026-04)
Karol HausmanCEO & co-founder, Physical IntelligenceLed Google Brain robotics manipulation moonshot (SayCan/RT era); adjunct professor at StanfordLeft Google DeepMind to found Pi (2024); raised to $5.6B valuation (as of 2025-11); reportedly in talks for ~$1B at $11B+ valuation (as of 2026-01, unverified)
Pieter AbbeelAmazon (Frontier AI & Robotics; AGI org) + UC Berkeley professorPioneer of deep RL and imitation learning for manipulation; co-founded Covariant (2017)Amazon hired Covariant's founders (Abbeel, Peter Chen, Rocky Duan) + ~25% of staff and licensed its foundation models (2024-08); appointed head of Amazon's LLM efforts within the AGI org (as of 2025-12) while continuing robotics
Jim Fan (Linxi Fan)NVIDIA — Director of AI & Distinguished Scientist; co-lead, GEAR lab + Project GR00T"Physical AI/embodied AGI" evangelism; Stanford PhD (under Fei-Fei Li); OpenAI's first intern; Voyager/EurekaAnnounced Project GR00T humanoid foundation model at GTC 2024-03; shipped GR00T N1 (2025-03) through N1.6 (2026), tested on Unitree G1, AgiBot Genie-1, YAM arms
Yuke ZhuUT Austin (RPL lab, associate professor) + NVIDIA — Director & Distinguished Research Scientist, co-lead GEARRobot perception & learning; sim frameworks (robosuite); GR00T model line (Simulation)Co-founded NVIDIA GEAR with Jim Fan (2024-02); IEEE Early Career Award for embodied AI (2025)
Carolina ParadaGoogle DeepMind — VP, Head of RoboticsLed the Gemini Robotics program: Gemini Robotics + Robotics-ER (2025-03), On-Device (2025-06), Robotics 1.5 (2025-09)Fronted DeepMind's robotics push 2025–2026; launched Google DeepMind Robotics Accelerator for European startups (2026); partnership deploying Gemini models on Agile Robots humanoids
Russ TedrakeMIT professor + SVP Large Behavior Models, Toyota Research InstituteUnderactuated robotics; diffusion policy work; Large Behavior Models (LBMs) for dexterous manipulationCo-led (with Scott Kuindersma) the Boston Dynamics–TRI demo of an LBM driving Atlas through long-horizon manipulation + locomotion sequences (2025-08)
Deepak PathakCEO & co-founder, Skild AI; CMU facultyCuriosity-driven RL, adaptive locomotion; "omni-bodied" robot brain thesisCo-founded Skild with Abhinav Gupta (2023); $300M Series A (2024-07); $1.4B round led by SoftBank at >$14B valuation (2026-01), with NVentures and Bezos Expeditions
Fei-Fei LiStanford HAI + CEO & co-founder, World LabsImageNet; "spatial intelligence" manifesto; world models as AI's next frontierFounded World Labs (2024, $230M); launched Marble, first commercial generative-3D world model (2025-11); closed $1B round led by Autodesk (2026-02-18; ~$5.4B post reported)
Marc RaibertFounder, Boston Dynamics; Executive Director, RAI InstituteLegged locomotion pioneer (MIT Leg Lab, BigDog, Atlas); founded Boston Dynamics 1992Runs Hyundai-backed RAI Institute (founded 2022); struck RL training partnership with Boston Dynamics for electric Atlas (2025-02); RAI framework produced Atlas's CES 2026 gymnastics and natural gait
Vincent VanhouckeWaymo — Distinguished EngineerBuilt Google's robotics research org over ~8 years (RT-1/RT-2 era); ex-head of robotics, Google DeepMindLeft DeepMind robotics citing health priorities; moved to Waymo to work on ML/robotics for driving (2024)
Corey LynchFigure AI — Director of AILanguage-conditioned imitation learning (ex-Google Brain); led Figure's Helix VLALeft Google Brain for Figure (2023-06); shipped Helix, first humanoid VLA with two-robot collaboration (2025-02)
Eric JangIndependent (as of 2026-01)VP of AI at 1X 2022–2026; "all roads lead to robots"; led NEO's Redwood AI model and 1X World ModelStepped down from 1X (2026-01); succeeded by Mohi Khansari (Redwood chief architect) as Head of Robot Learning

Physical Intelligence's other co-founders: Brian Ichter (ex-Google Brain), Quan Vuong, Adnan Esmail, and Stripe-veteran investor Lachy Groom ("Jasmine Hsu" appears on some rosters but is absent from most, incl. the 2026-01 TechCrunch profile — unverified; see PI deep dive); π0.7 lists ~90 authors including Danny Driess.

John Deere, AT&T Ventures, Qatar Investment Authority

Caitlin Kalinowskiex-OpenAI — hardware/robotics lead 2024-11 → 2026-03Led Meta AR glasses hardware; Apple product designJoined OpenAI to build robotics/hardware from scratch (2024-11); resigned 2026-03-07 citing governance concerns over OpenAI's Pentagon contract ("lethal autonomy without human authorization"); OpenAI confirmed the departure, saying the contract excludes domestic surveillance and autonomous weapons; Benjamin Bolte (founder of collapsed open-source humanoid startup K-Scale Labs) joined OpenAI the same week; OpenAI's robotics division is now fronted by Aditya Ramesh as VP of Robotics (Landscape: USA)

Founders and executives — China

See Landscape: China for the full company picture.

PersonCompany & roleBackgroundNotable moves 2024–2026
Wang Xingxing (王兴兴)Unitree Robotics — founder & CEO (Hangzhou, founded 2016)Low-cost quadrupeds (Go/B series) then humanoids (H1, G1, R1); >32% global humanoid unit share in 2025 (as reported)Front-row seat at Xi Jinping's private-sector symposium (2025-02); filed ¥4.2B (~$608M) STAR Market IPO (2026-03) — first pure-play humanoid listing; holds 23.8% direct equity and 68.78% voting rights; reported 2025 revenue ~¥1.7B (¥1.69B per Caixin, up from ¥393M in 2024) with humanoids >half; ~half of IPO proceeds earmarked for AI model training; CSRC granted registration approval 2026-07-03, reported IPO valuation up to ~¥40B (~$5.9B)
Peng Zhihui (彭志辉, "Zhihui Jun")AgiBot / Zhiyuan Robotics — co-founder & CTO (Shanghai, founded 2023)Ex-Huawei "Genius Youth" recruit; Bilibili maker-celebrity; leads AgiBot's robots + GO-1/Genie foundation models and AgiBot World dataset (Data)10,000th AgiBot humanoid off the line (2026-03); declared 2026 the "Year of Deployment" — four humanoids ran a live-streamed 8-hour factory shift (2026-04); chairman of STAR-listed Swancor/Shangwei after AgiBot's backdoor-listing move (2025, as reported); awarded China Youth May Fourth Medal (2026-05)

Notable moves timeline, 2024–2026

  • 2024-02/03 — Jim Fan & Yuke Zhu launch NVIDIA GEAR lab; Project GR00T announced at GTC. Physical Intelligence founded by Hausman, Levine, Finn, Ichter, Hsu. Peggy Johnson named Agility Robotics CEO.
  • 2024-08 — Amazon hires Covariant founders (Abbeel, Chen, Duan) plus ~25% of staff; non-exclusive license to Covariant's robot foundation models.
  • 2024-H2 — Vincent Vanhoucke leaves Google DeepMind robotics for Waymo; Caitlin Kalinowski joins OpenAI from Meta (2024-11) to lead hardware/robotics.
  • 2025-02 — Figure ends OpenAI partnership; Corey Lynch's team unveils Helix. Boston Dynamics partners with Raibert's RAI Institute on RL for Atlas. Apptronik raises $350M Series A.
  • 2025-06 — Milan Kovac exits Tesla; Ashok Elluswamy adds Optimus to his FSD portfolio.
  • 2025-08 — Boston Dynamics + TRI (Tedrake/Kuindersma) demo Large Behavior Model on Atlas.
  • 2025-09 — Figure closes >$1B Series C at $39B post-money.
  • 2025-10/11 — 1X opens NEO pre-orders; World Labs (Fei-Fei Li) ships Marble; Physical Intelligence valued at $5.6B.
  • 2025-12 — Abbeel named head of Amazon's LLM efforts (AGI org); Galbot picks banks for HK IPO.
  • 2026-01 — Skild AI raises $1.4B at >$14B (SoftBank-led); Eric Jang steps down at 1X.
  • 2026-02 — Robert Playter steps down at Boston Dynamics; Apptronik extends Series A to >$935M (~$5.3B valuation).
  • 2026-03 — Unitree files $608M STAR Market IPO; Kalinowski resigns from OpenAI over Pentagon deal, Benjamin Bolte (ex-K-Scale) joins; AgiBot's 10,000th humanoid.
  • 2026-04 — Physical Intelligence releases π0.7; 1X starts full-scale NEO production in Hayward.
  • 2026-06 — Agility Robotics discusses SPAC merger with Churchill Capital Corp XI; Hyundai takes 100% of Boston Dynamics, buying SoftBank's remaining 9.65% stake for $325M.
  • 2026-07 — Unitree wins CSRC registration approval for its ¥4.2B STAR Market IPO (2026-07-03).

Patterns worth knowing

  • The Google robotics diaspora seeded the US field. Physical Intelligence (Hausman, Ichter), Figure's Helix team (Lynch), 1X's AI team (Jang), and Skild's rivals all trace to Google Brain/DeepMind robotics; Vanhoucke, who built that org, is now at Waymo. Google DeepMind rebuilt around Parada's Gemini Robotics group (Organizations).
  • Dual-hat academics dominate the model layer. Levine (Berkeley/Pi), Finn (Stanford/Pi), Zhu (UT Austin/NVIDIA), Pathak (CMU/Skild), Tedrake (MIT/TRI), Wang He (PKU/Galbot) all keep faculty posts while running industrial efforts — the talent pool is that thin.
  • Autonomy veterans migrated to robots. Kyle Vogt (Cruise → Bot Company), Elluswamy (Autopilot → Optimus), Vanhoucke (robotics → Waymo, the reverse direction) reflect the FSD↔robotics stack convergence.
  • 2026 executive churn tracks commercialization pressure. Playter (Boston Dynamics), Kovac (Tesla), Kalinowski (OpenAI), Jang (1X) all exited within ~9 months as owners pushed from R&D toward production economics (Investment).
  • China's founder profile differs: hardware-native founders (Wang Xingxing, Peng Zhihui) with state-aligned capital and IPO paths, versus US model-first founders with venture mega-rounds (State of the art, Landscape: USA).

Organizations: Global Who's-Who

✓ 已核查更新 2026-07-04organizations

The Physical AI field is organized around four kinds of players: software-first "robot brain" labs (Physical Intelligence, Skild AI, Google DeepMind Robotics), vertically integrated humanoid makers (Figure, Tesla, 1X, Apptronik in the US; Unitree, AgiBot, UBTech, Galbot in China; Neura in Europe), big-tech platform divisions (NVIDIA's Isaac/GR00T stack, Amazon warehouse robotics, Toyota Research Institute, Hyundai/Boston Dynamics), and academic + state-backed programs (Stanford, Berkeley, CMU, ETH Zurich, Ai2, China's national innovation centers, Korea's K-Humanoid Alliance). As of 2026-07 the capital league table is led by Figure ($39B valuation), Skild AI ($14B), Neura (~$7B), Unitree (~$6B IPO target), and Physical Intelligence ($5.6B), while China dominates unit volume — Unitree + AgiBot alone are forecast to take ~80% of 2026 humanoid shipments. Deeper regional detail lives in Landscape: USA, Landscape: China, and Landscape: rest of world.

Master table — organizations that matter (as of 2026-07)

OrganizationRegionTypeFocusFlagship resultScale signal
Figure AIUSA (San Jose)StartupHumanoids + in-house VLAFigure 03 + Helix 02 whole-body VLA (2026-01)$39B valuation, >$1.9B raised (as of 2025-09)
TeslaUSABig-tech divisionHumanoid mass productionOptimus V3, Fremont line starting ~2026 summerTargets Model S/X line conversion; 22-DoF-per-hand V3 (unverified)
Physical Intelligence (π)USA (SF)Startup (software-only)Cross-embodiment robot foundation modelsπ*0.6 w/ RECAP RL (2025-11); π0.7 (2026-04)$5.6B valuation, >$1B raised (as of 2025-11)

AgiBot / ZhiyuanChina (Shanghai)StartupHumanoids + GO-1 FM + open datasets10,000th unit produced (2026-03); AgiBot World datasetAcquired ~63.6% control of A-share-listed Swancor (2025-07); AgiBot denies a backdoor listing; HK IPO planned
UBTechChina (Shenzhen)Public companyWalker S industrial humanoidsWalker S2 with hot-swap battery; >1,000 units shipped 2025HK-listed; auto-factory orders (BYD, Foxconn et al.)
GalbotChina (Beijing)StartupWheeled dual-arm retail robotsG1 running unmanned retail stores~$3B valuation after ¥2.5B round (2026-03) (unverified)

FourierChina (Shanghai)StartupGR-series humanoids (rehab origin)GR-3 care-oriented humanoid (a robot — distinct from ByteDance Seed's GR-3 VLA model of the same name)Among top-5 China humanoid shippers (as of 2025)
Sanctuary AICanada (Vancouver)StartupDexterous hands + PhoenixHydraulic high-DoF handsNew round closed 2026-05 (amount undisclosed)
K-Humanoid AllianceSouth KoreaNational programShared "robot brain" + platform~$770M state investment pledged to 2030~40 companies/labs incl. Samsung–Rainbow Robotics

Software-first "robot brain" labs

  • Physical Intelligence (π) — founded 2024, San Francisco, by Karol Hausman, Sergey Levine, Chelsea Finn et al. (ex-Google Brain/DeepMind, Stanford, Berkeley). Trajectory: π0 (2024-10) → open-sourced openpi (2025) → π0.5 open-world generalization (2025-04) → **π*0.6 + RECAP (RL from deployment experience; >2x throughput and ~half the failure rate on hardest tasks incl. laundry folding and a 13h espresso run; 2025-11-17) → Multi-Scale Embodied Memory for ~15-min long-horizon tasks (2026-03) → π0.7 "steerable" 5B-param generalist with compositional skill recombination (2026-04). Raised $600M led by Alphabet's CapitalG at $5.6B valuation (as of 2025-11)**; total >$1B. Sells no hardware. See VLA models.
  • Skild AI — founded 2023, Pittsburgh, by CMU professors Deepak Pathak and Abhinav Gupta. "Skild Brain": one omni-bodied model for quadrupeds, arms, humanoids, mobile manipulators. $1.4B Series C led by SoftBank at >$14B valuation (announced 2026-01-14), with NVentures, Macquarie Capital, Bezos Expeditions, LG, Schneider Electric, Salesforce Ventures, and returning Lightspeed/Felicis/Coatue/Sequoia; ~$30M revenue ramp in 2025 (unverified). Tripled valuation in ~7 months (from $4.5B in 2025 summer).
  • Google DeepMind Robotics — Gemini Robotics family on Gemini 2.0+: Gemini Robotics + ER (2025-03), On-Device (2025-06), Gemini Robotics 1.5 + ER 1.5 (2025-09) — agentic multi-step reasoning, cross-embodiment transfer demonstrated ALOHA2 → Franka → Apptronik Apollo without retraining. ER 1.5 publicly available via Gemini API; VLA restricted to partners. Hardware partners: Apptronik (humanoids), Agile Robots (2026-03, CNBC).
  • Ai2 (Allen Institute for AI) — the open-science counterweight: MolmoAct 2 (2026-05) released weights plus 720 hours of bimanual training data, code, and evals; claims wins over π0.5 on real-world manipulation benchmarks (single-source, company blog). Also a named partner on NVIDIA's GR00T reference humanoid.
  • Related open efforts: Physical Intelligence's openpi, AgiBot's GO-1 + AgiBot World dataset, X-Humanoid's open platform — see Data and State of the art.

Big-tech platform divisions

  • NVIDIA — sells the picks and shovels for the whole field: Jetson Thor onboard compute, Isaac Sim/Lab simulation, Cosmos world models, GR00T N open robot foundation models, Newton physics engine. At GTC Taipei (2026-05-31) announced the Isaac GR00T Reference Humanoid Robot: Unitree H2 Plus chassis (31 DoF) + Sharpa Wave tactile hands (22 DoF each) + Jetson Thor T5000 (2,070 FP4 TFLOPS, 128GB), ~3h battery; sold via Unitree from late 2026; launch research partners Ai2, ETH Zurich, Stanford Robotics Center, UCSD ARCLab. NVIDIA/NVentures also holds stakes in Figure, Skild, Neura, and others — it invests across all competing bets. See Hardware, Simulation.
  • Tesla — Optimus program; V3 design with 22-DoF hands (unverified). Production slated for Fremont on the retired Model S/X line starting ~2026 summer; Musk warns initial output "extremely slow" (~10,000 unique parts) and declined a 2026 volume target; long-term aspiration ~1M units/yr, $20–30K price (aspirational, as of 2026-04).
  • Amazon — largest robot fleet on Earth (>1M mobile robots as of 2025); Vulcan touch-enabled picking arm (2025-05); DeepFleet foundation model for fleet routing (2025-06). Investor in Agility (earlier) and Neura's 2026 Series C.
  • Hyundai / Boston Dynamics + Toyota Research Institute — BD's electric Atlas is trained with TRI's Large Behavior Models: a single 450M-param diffusion-transformer, language-conditioned policy controls the whole body (hands and feet treated alike) for long-horizon manipulation + locomotion (2025-08). Deployment path into Hyundai Metaplant manufacturing.
  • SoftBank — emerging robotics super-aggregator: led Skild's $1.4B round; agreed to acquire ABB's robotics division for ~$5.4B (announced 2025-10) (unverified).
  • Meta — Reality Labs robotics group building a humanoid software platform (announced 2025-02) (unverified); no shipped robot as of 2026-07.
  • Samsung — majority stake in Rainbow Robotics (KAIST Hubo lineage) completed 2025; anchor of Korea's K-Humanoid effort (as of 2025).

China: companies + state apparatus

China ships the large majority of global humanoid units — TrendForce forecasts China's 2026 humanoid output up 94% YoY with Unitree + AgiBot capturing ~80% of shipments; one report puts China at ~90% of global units (unverified). Embodied intelligence is named a "future industry" in the national five-year plan; forecast domestic market ~¥870B (~$128B) by 2030 (state-media figure).

OrgNote
UnitreePrice-war leader (G1 ~$16K, R1 entry model ~$6K at 2025 launch); first "embodied AI" company cleared for a STAR Market IPO — listing committee passed 2026-06-01, CSRC registration approved 2026-07-03; ~¥40B (~$5.9–6.2B) target valuation
AgiBot (Zhiyuan)Founded by ex-Huawei "Genius Youth" Peng Zhihui; 10,000 cumulative units (2026-03); GO-1 foundation model; open AgiBot World dataset; acquired ~63.6% control of A-share-listed Swancor Advanced Materials (2025-07) — AgiBot publicly denies the "backdoor listing" characterization (see Landscape: China)
UBTechWalker S series in auto plants; >1,000 units shipped in 2025; HK-listed
GalbotPKU spin-off (Wang He); wheeled dual-arm G1 in unmanned retail; ¥2.5B round (2026-03)
FourierShanghai; GR-3 care humanoid (name collides with ByteDance Seed's GR-3 VLA model — unrelated), rehab-robotics origin
X-Humanoid (Beijing HRIC)State-backed innovation center (Jingcheng + Xiaomi + UBTech, 2023-11); Tien Kung robot won 2025 Beijing robot half-marathon
Shanghai Embodied AI Innovation Center"National and local co-built" center expanded at WAIC 2025; open OpenLoong/Qinglong humanoid platform
New entrantsConsumer-electronics giants entering: Xiaomi (CyberOne lineage), Honor — the smartphone maker's "Lightning" robot ("Flash" in some translations) won the 2026 Beijing half-marathon in 50:26 running autonomously, beating the ratified human world record (57:20) — independently confirmed (Scientific American, CBS, NPR), though the winner fell late in the race after clipping a barricade and was set upright by handlers (2026-04)

The 2026 Beijing Yizhuang half-marathon's rule change (1.2x time penalty for teleoperated robots) pushed ~38% of entrants to run fully autonomously (per Scientific American) — a useful proxy for China's locomotion-autonomy progress, albeit on a dedicated, pre-mapped course. See Locomotion, Landscape: China.

US & European humanoid makers

  • Figure AI — best-capitalized pure-play: >$1B Series C at $39B post-money (2025-09), led by Parkway Venture Capital with NVIDIA, Intel Capital, LG, Salesforce, Qualcomm Ventures, Brookfield. In-house Helix VLA (2025-02, post-OpenAI split) → Figure 03 designed for mass manufacture + home (2025-10) → Helix 02 whole-body autonomy — single learned controller for walking + balance + manipulation, flagship 61-action dishwasher load/unload demo (2026-01-27). BotQ factory tooled for 12,000 units/yr; prior BMW Spartanburg deployment ran ~11 months (unverified).
  • Apptronik (Austin; NASA Valkyrie lineage via UT Austin HCRL) — Apollo humanoid; pilots with Mercedes-Benz and GXO; Google DeepMind model partner; ~$5B valuation (as of 2026) (unverified).
  • Agility Robotics — Digit is the workhorse of the "boring but real" deployment thesis: tote-moving at GXO under RaaS contracts; RoboFab volume factory.
  • 1X Technologies (Norway/Redwood City; OpenAI-backed) — NEO home humanoid, early-adopter deliveries at $20,000 (or subscription), the first serious consumer-home humanoid program (as of 2026).
  • Boston Dynamics — see above (Hyundai + TRI LBM).
  • Neura Robotics (Metzingen, Germany) — Europe's top-funded humanoid maker: Series C up to $1.4B (announced 2026-06-10) at ~$7B valuation (valuation per press reports; company declined comment); led by Tether, with Qualcomm, Amazon, NVIDIA, Bosch, Schaeffler, EIB, imec.xpand. Note: the $1.4B is a milestone-contingent ceiling, not cash banked. 4NE-1 humanoid + MAiRA cobots + "Neuraverse" data platform; claims >$1B order book + deployment pipeline and "millions of robots by 2030" (company claims, unverified).
  • Agile Robots (Munich) — DLR spin-off; Google DeepMind partnership (2026-03).
  • Sanctuary AI (Vancouver) — Phoenix humanoid, hydraulic dexterous hands; new funding 2026-05.
  • Also in the ecosystem: Dyna Robotics, Generalist AI, Dexterity, Collaborative Robotics (Cobot) — smaller/less-documented; see Landscape: USA.

Academic labs (talent + open research pipeline)

LabWhy it matters
Stanford (IRIS, Stanford Robotics Center)Chelsea Finn (PI co-founder), ALOHA/Mobile-ALOHA lineage; GR00T reference-robot launch partner
UC Berkeley (BAIR/RAIL)Sergey Levine (PI co-founder); deep-RL-for-robotics intellectual home
CMU (Robotics Institute)Pathak & Gupta → Skild; largest US robotics department
ETH Zurich (Robotic Systems Lab)Marco Hutter; ANYmal, legged-robot RL; spin-offs ANYbotics, Flexion; GR00T partner
UCSD (ARCLab)GR00T reference-robot partner; surgical/embodied autonomy
Ai2Fully open models + data (MolmoAct 2)
KAIST / Korean universitiesHubo DRC-2015 lineage; core of K-Humanoid Alliance
Tsinghua / Peking Univ.Feeder labs for Galbot, Unitree, AgiBot talent; embodied-AI benchmarks

The dominant 2024–2026 pattern: professor-founded startups (Skild, PI, Galbot) pull entire labs into industry — see Key people.

National programs

  • China — whole-of-nation push: embodied intelligence in the five-year plan; national + provincial innovation centers (Beijing X-Humanoid, Shanghai center); state-orchestrated IPO channel opening (Unitree first approval 2026-06); municipal subsidy stacks. See Landscape: China.
  • South Korea — K-Humanoid Alliance (launched 2025-04): ~$770M (₩1T) state investment to 2030, shared "robot brain," target 1,000 humanoids/yr production by 2029 and global top-tier humanoids by 2030; Samsung/Rainbow, LG, Doosan, Hyundai participating (as of 2026).
  • Japan — robotics incumbents (Fanuc, Yaskawa, Kawasaki, Honda/Toyota labs) + state-backed long-term VC vehicle (~¥1.4T target, 2025-03) (unverified); strength in components and industrial arms rather than humanoid startups.
  • EU/Germany — High-Tech Strategy 2025 (~€350M robotics-relevant R&D to 2026); EIB directly invested in Neura's 2026 round; Horizon Europe robotics calls.
  • USA — no dedicated national humanoid program; leadership rests on private capital (robotics companies raised $55.8B globally in 2026 YTD per Dealroom, heavily US/China) plus DARPA/NSF/NASA project funding. See Investment.

Reading the field

  • Brains vs. bodies: billion-dollar checks now go to software-only labs (PI, Skild) on the thesis that the model layer captures the value; hardware margins compress toward Chinese price points (Unitree G1 ~$16K, R1 ~$6K).
  • NVIDIA sits under everyone: compute (Thor), sim (Isaac/Cosmos/Newton), open models (GR00T N), and equity stakes in most major players — cooperative monopoly dynamics.
  • China wins volume, US wins valuation (as of 2026-07): ~50,000 global humanoid shipments forecast for 2026 (TrendForce, ~8x YoY), dominated by Unitree/AgiBot; the five most valuable private players are majority-US.
  • Verification gap: many flagship claims (BMW hours, order backlogs, revenue ramps) are company-sourced and marked unverified above; treat scale signals as directional. See Open problems.

Academic Lab Map

✓ 已核查更新 2026-07-04academic-labs

A few dozen university labs supply most of Physical AI's ideas, datasets, benchmarks, and founders. The US pipeline runs through Stanford (IRIS/Finn, SVL/Fei-Fei Li, REAL/Shuran Song), Berkeley (RAIL/Levine, BAIR), CMU (Pathak & Gupta → Skild AI), MIT (Tedrake ↔ Toyota Research Institute), UT Austin (Zhu ↔ NVIDIA GEAR; Sentis → Apptronik) and UW (Fox → NVIDIA → Ai2); China's runs through Tsinghua's IIIS — which by 2026 had incubated three robotics unicorns (Robotera, Galaxea, Spirit AI) — Peking University (Galbot, PsiBot), Shanghai AI Lab, HIT (Leju) and Zhejiang (DEEP Robotics); Europe's flagship is ETH Zurich's RSL (Hutter), whose spinoffs span ANYbotics to Amazon-acquired RIVR; Korea's KAIST seeded Rainbow Robotics (now Samsung-controlled) and Raion; Japan's UTokyo JSK begat SCHAFT (bought by Google, 2013). Nearly every foundational artifact of the field — ALOHA, Diffusion Policy, UMI, DROID, Open X-Embodiment, LIBERO, BEHAVIOR, legged_gym — originated in academia, and the dominant staffing pattern is the "dual-hat" professor who runs a startup or corporate lab without giving up the faculty post.

Why the academic map matters

  • Academia is the upstream of the Google diaspora. The Google Brain/DeepMind robotics group that later seeded Physical Intelligence, Figure's Helix team, and 1X's AI team (Key people) was itself staffed from Berkeley, Stanford, and CMU PhD programs — the labs below are the regenerating source of the field's talent tree.
  • Datasets and benchmarks are academia's main lever. Companies hoard robot data (Data); universities publish it. Every widely used open corpus (OXE, DROID), teleop rig (ALOHA, UMI), sim benchmark (LIBERO, BEHAVIOR-1K, RoboCasa), and locomotion toolchain (legged_gym/rsl_rl, RaiSim) has a university of origin.
  • The "dual-hat" professor is the field's defining employment structure (as of 2026-07): Levine (Berkeley + Pi), Finn (Stanford + Pi), Zhu (UT Austin + NVIDIA), Pathak & Gupta (CMU + Skild), Tedrake (MIT + TRI), Wang He (PKU + Galbot), Chen Jianyu (Tsinghua + Robotera), Zhu Qiuguo (ZJU + DEEP Robotics), Hwangbo (KAIST + Raion). The talent pool is thin enough that neither side forces a choice.
  • Corporate capture of academic lineages is accelerating: Google–SCHAFT (2013), Hyundai–Boston Dynamics (2021), Samsung–Rainbow Robotics (control approved 2025-03), Amazon–Covariant team (2024-08), Amazon–RIVR (2026-03).

United States

Lab (institution)PI(s)Signature contributionsIndustry pipeline
IRIS, StanfordChelsea FinnMAML; ALOHA/ACT + Mobile ALOHA teleop rigs; DROID (13-institution corpus); OpenVLA (with Berkeley/TRI)Finn co-founded Physical Intelligence (2024); students Tony Zhao & (REAL-lab) Cheng Chi founded Sunday Robotics; alumni throughout Pi and Google DeepMind
SVL / HAI, StanfordFei-Fei Li, Jiajun WuImageNet legacy; BEHAVIOR-1K benchmark + OmniGibson (1,000 household activities; NeurIPS challenge series, 2026 edition: 100 tasks/20k demos)Li founded World Labs (2024, Marble world model); PhD lineage includes Jim Fan (NVIDIA GEAR co-lead) and Yuke Zhu
REAL, Stanford (ex-Columbia)Shuran SongDiffusion Policy (with TRI, RSS 2023), UMI handheld gripper — both field-standardSong moved Columbia→Stanford 2023, student Cheng Chi followed; Chi co-founded Sunday Robotics (CTO); heavy TRI collaboration
RAIL / BAIR, UC BerkeleySergey Levine (RAIL); Pieter Abbeel; Ken GoldbergSAC, offline RL, Open X-Embodiment/RT-X co-lead, OpenVLA; Dex-Net grasping (Goldberg)Levine co-founded Pi; Abbeel co-founded Covariant (→ Amazon 2024-08); Goldberg co-founded Ambi Robotics + Jacobi Robotics; PhD/postdoc diaspora staffs faculty everywhere (Finn→Stanford, Pathak→CMU, A. Gupta→UW, Kumar→CMU, Yang Gao→Tsinghua)
Robotics Institute, CMUDeepak Pathak, Abhinav Gupta (both on leave/dual-hat)Curiosity-driven RL, rapid motor adaptation for legged robots, self-supervised robot learning; RI is the oldest US robotics department (1979) + NREC contract labPathak & Gupta founded Skild AI (2023, Pittsburgh) — $14B+ valuation (2026-01); DARPA Urban Challenge (Boss, 2007) lineage fed the AV industry (History)
CSAIL / Leg Lab legacy, MITRuss Tedrake; Pulkit Agrawal; Sangbae Kim (biomimetics); Daniela Rus (CSAIL director)Underactuated robotics course/canon; TRI Large Behavior Models; Mini Cheetah (first backflipping quadruped); Improbable AI dexterity + locomotion RLTedrake is SVP at Toyota Research Institute (MIT–TRI is the deepest US lab–corporate marriage); Marc Raibert's Leg Lab → Boston Dynamics (1992); Sangbae Kim joined Meta as Robotics Architect on its humanoid ("Metabot") program (2025-03; on leave from MIT); Rus co-founded Liquid AI
RSE / WEIRD, U. WashingtonDieter Fox; Abhishek GuptaState estimation → robot learning; Fox built NVIDIA's Seattle Robotics Lab (2017–2025) adjacent to campusFox left NVIDIA for Ai2 (2025-07) to lead its robotics foundation-model initiative (MolmoAct open embodied models); Ai2 is a 2026 NVIDIA GR00T reference-robot partner
RPL / LARG / HCRL, UT AustinYuke Zhu; Peter Stone; Luis Sentisrobosuite, LIBERO (with Stone), RoboCasa kitchen-scale sim; RoboCup legacy; whole-body controlZhu co-leads NVIDIA GEAR (GR00T line, NVIDIA); Stone is Chief Scientist at Sony AI; Sentis's HCRL spun out Apptronik (2016, ~$5.3B as of 2026-02)
USC (RESL/ICAROS)Gaurav Sukhatme; Stefanos Nikolaidis; Erdem Bıyık; Maja Matarić (socially assistive legacy)Multi-robot systems, human-robot interaction, RLHF-for-robots strandsSteady feeder of PhDs to NVIDIA/Amazon; no marquee spinout (as of 2026-07)
  • Georgia Tech (Danfei Xu, a Stanford SVL alum) contributed EgoMimic human-video co-training; UCSD's ARC Lab is a GR00T reference-robot partner — the map's second tier is dense and growing.
  • NVIDIA formalized the academia channel on 2026-06-01: the Isaac GR00T reference humanoid (Unitree H2 Plus chassis, Sharpa Wave tactile hands, Jetson Thor) ships to Ai2, ETH Zurich, Stanford Robotics Center, and UCSD ARCLab first, available from Unitree late 2026.

China

Lab (institution)PI(s)Signature contributionsIndustry pipeline
IIIS, Tsinghua (Andrew Yao's institute)Chen Jianyu; Yang Gao; Hang Zhao (MARS Lab); Huazhe Xu (TEA Lab)Data Scaling Laws in Imitation Learning (ICLR 2025 oral); RL + VLA research; IIIS runs an explicit incubation modelRobotera (Chen, 2023, Tsinghua holds equity — company claim); Galaxea AI (Hang Zhao co-founder/chief scientist, ex-Waymo); Spirit AI (Yang Gao co-founder/chief scientist, Berkeley PhD) — three unicorns from one institute by 2026
EPIC Lab, Peking UniversityWang He (王鹤)Category-level pose estimation, GAPartNet-line perception; directs BAAI's embodied-AI centerGalbot (2023): wheeled dual-arm G1, >$2.8B valuation, ~¥5B raised (as of 2026-03), HK IPO prep (Landscape: China)
Institute for AI, Peking UniversityYaodong YangMulti-agent RL; NeurIPS 2022 dexterous-manipulation challenge winner; PKU–PsiBot joint labPsiBot (灵初智能): chief scientist Yang; ¥2B raised across angel/Pre-A (as of 2025); Psi R0/R1 pitched as first end-to-end RL-based embodied models (company claim)
Shanghai AI Lab — Embodied AI Center / OpenRobotLabJiangmiao Pang (research lead)InternRobotics stack, GRUtopia city-scale sim, learned locomotion (Hybrid Internal Model); state-backed EIbench evaluation (Evaluation)State lab rather than spinout factory; supplies open models/benchmarks to Chinese ecosystem; partners with OpenDriveLab (HKU)
Shanghai Qi Zhi InstituteFounded by Andrew Yao (2020)Bridge institute hosting Tsinghua-affiliated embodied-AI researchers (Yang Gao, Huazhe Xu circles)Feeder into the same Tsinghua startup cluster (Spirit AI et al.)
HIT (Harbin Institute of Technology)State Key Lab of Robotics & System (est. 1986)One of China's first robotics labs; space manipulators (Tiangong program); on US entity list since 2020Leju Robotics (2016, Leng Xiaokun): Kuavo — first HarmonyOS open-source humanoid (2023-12); $207M pre-IPO (led by Greenwoods); co-built Beijing Shijingshan data-collection center (Data)
Zhejiang UniversityZhu Qiuguo (Control College)Jueying quadrupeds, Wukong humanoid; ZJUDancer student robot-soccer team as talent funnelDEEP Robotics (2017, Zhu still associate professor) — quadruped #2 to Unitree in China; ZJU claims cultivation of Hangzhou's "six little dragons" cluster (DeepSeek, Unitree, DEEP Robotics...) though Unitree's Wang Xingxing is not a ZJU alum
  • The Chinese pattern differs structurally from the US: professor-founders keep posts and universities/state funds take equity (Tsinghua in Robotera; "Big Fund" in Galbot; CDB Capital in PsiBot), with IPO paths (STAR Market, HK) rather than perpetual venture rounds (Investment).
  • BAAI (Beijing) acts as a cross-university embodied-AI coordinator (Wang He directs its embodied center while running Galbot).

Europe

Lab (institution)PI(s)Signature contributionsIndustry pipeline
RSL, ETH ZurichMarco HutterANYmal quadruped; actuator networks (Hwangbo, Science Robotics 2019); teacher–student sim-to-real; legged_gym + rsl_rl (community-standard RL locomotion stack); Isaac Lab co-development with NVIDIA; DARPA SubT-winning robots (Locomotion)ANYbotics (2016, >$150M raised as of 2024-12); RIVR/ex-Swiss-Mile (Bjelonic, 2023; Bezos-backed; acquired by Amazon 2026-03); Ascento; Flexion Robotics; PhD alumni: Hwangbo (KAIST), Mittal (dual ETH/NVIDIA); NVIDIA runs Zurich robotics research nearby
LASA / BioRob, EPFLAude Billard; Auke IjspeertLearning-from-demonstration canon (Billard); CPG-based locomotion, salamander robot (Ijspeert)Talent exporter more than spinout factory; alumni across European faculty and DeepMind
IAS, TU DarmstadtJan PetersPolicy search, movement primitives; heads DFKI's SAIROL robot-learning department (since 2022)Europe's robot-learning PhD schoolhouse — alumni hold chairs across the continent (e.g., Gerhard Neumann at KIT)
H2T, KITTamim AsfourARMAR humanoid family (continuous development since ~1998, ARMAR-6/7) — Europe's longest-running humanoid platformResearch platform lineage; feeds German industrial robotics ecosystem
Imperial / OxfordEdward Johns (Robot Learning Lab); Oxford Robotics Institute (Posner, Newman et al.)Few-shot imitation (Imperial); field robotics + AV autonomy (ORI)ORI spun out Oxa (née Oxbotica, AV software); Google DeepMind's London robotics group is the gravitational sink for UK robot-learning talent
  • Europe's structural problem (as of 2026-07): it produces world-class locomotion/hardware talent but its spinoffs either stay niche (ANYbotics = industrial inspection) or sell to US acquirers (Amazon–RIVR); no European robot-foundation-model lab has raised at US/China scale. Google DeepMind launched a European robotics accelerator in 2026 partly in response (Landscape: RoW).

Korea and Japan

Lab (institution)PI(s)Signature contributionsIndustry pipeline
Hubo Lab, KAISTJun Ho Oh (emeritus) → lab continuationHUBO (2005, Korea's first biped); DRC-HUBO won the DARPA Robotics Challenge Finals (2015, $2M) (History)Rainbow Robotics (2011 spinout); Samsung raised stake 14.7%→35% (announced 2024-12, approved 2025-03) making it controlling shareholder; Oh now heads Samsung's Future Robotics Office
RaiLab, KAISTJemin Hwangbo (ETH RSL PhD)RaiSim physics engine; actuator-network sim-to-real; Raibo quadruped (first robot to finish a full marathon, 2024-11)Raion Robotics (2023, Hwangbo as CEO): commercializing Raibo-line quadrupeds
JSK Lab, UTokyoMasayuki Inaba (lineage of Hirochika Inoue, lab est. ~1970s)Musculoskeletal humanoids (Kotaro, Kojiro, Kenshiro), JAXON; deep ROS contributionsSCHAFT (2012, Nakanishi & Urata): left the university to accept DARPA funding, won DRC Trials 2013, acquired by Google (2013), shut down 2018 after the SoftBank sale collapsed — the cautionary tale of corporate capture
Waseda (Takanishi Lab legacy)Atsuo Takanishi lineageWABOT-1 (1973) — first full-scale anthropomorphic robot; WABIAN bipedsHistoric root of all humanoid programs (Honda's P2/ASIMO era drew on this milieu); today more legacy than pipeline
  • Japan's 2026 academic-industrial vehicle is AIRoA (~10,000 h open mobile-manipulator dataset + ICRA 2026 competition, Toyota HSR platform — see Data); Korea's is Samsung–Rainbow plus KAIST's continuing locomotion strength.

Datasets, benchmarks, and tools that originate in academia

ArtifactOrigin labWhy it matters
ALOHA / ACT / Mobile ALOHA (2023–24)Stanford IRIS (Tony Zhao, Zipeng Fu; ALOHA 2 with Google DeepMind)$20–30k open teleop rig — the template for global data collection, incl. Chinese data centers (Data)
Diffusion Policy (RSS 2023)Columbia REAL (Cheng Chi, Song) + TRIDefault visuomotor policy class before/alongside VLAs (Manipulation)
UMI (2024)Stanford/Columbia REALHandheld robot-free data capture, ~3× teleop throughput
DROID (2024)Stanford-led, 13 institutionsStandardized-rig diversity corpus; substrate for RoboArena eval
Open X-Embodiment / RT-X (2023)21-institution collaboration with Google DeepMindDefault VLA pretraining corpus; cross-embodiment transfer proof
OpenVLA (2024)Stanford + Berkeley + TRI et al.Most-cited open VLA baseline (VLA models)
LIBERO (2023)UT Austin (Liu, Zhu, Stone)De-facto (now saturated) VLA scorecard (Evaluation)
RoboCasa / robosuiteUT Austin RPL (Zhu)Kitchen-scale sim + the underlying framework of much manipulation research
BEHAVIOR-1K + OmniGibson (2024→)Stanford SVL (Li, Wu)1,000-activity long-horizon benchmark; annual NeurIPS challenge; "ImageNet for robotics" aspiration
Dex-Net (2017–19)Berkeley (Goldberg, Mahler)Grasping-at-scale lineage → Ambi Robotics
legged_gym / rsl_rl / RaiSimETH RSL (Rudin; Hwangbo)The recipe stack that made RL locomotion the industry default (Locomotion, Simulation)
EgoMimic (2024)Georgia Tech (Danfei Xu)Human-video co-training evidence feeding the egocentric-data wave

Talent-flow patterns

  • Academia → Google → startup → (sometimes) back. Berkeley/Stanford PhDs staffed Google Brain robotics; its 2023–24 diaspora founded Pi and staffed Figure/1X; the founders' academic co-authors and students now flow directly to those startups, skipping the Google step (Tony Zhao: Stanford → Sunday; Karl Pertsch: Berkeley/Stanford postdoc, DROID/OpenVLA/RoboArena → Physical Intelligence, member of technical staff per his own site).
  • NVIDIA is the connective tissue of the map (as of 2026-07): GEAR co-led by a UT Austin professor, Isaac Lab co-developed with ETH RSL, the Seattle lab built by a UW professor (until Fox's 2025 Ai2 move), NVentures in Skild, and the GR00T reference humanoid shipped to four academic labs in 2026. No other company embeds in this many universities (NVIDIA).
  • China compresses the pipeline. US pattern: PhD (5 yr) → industry lab → startup. Tsinghua/PKU pattern: assistant professor founds the company directly, university takes equity, state funds follow, IPO within ~3 years of founding (Robotera, Galbot). Result: China's academic labs and its humanoid industry are effectively the same org chart.
  • Locomotion talent is genealogically concentrated: Raibert (MIT) → Boston Dynamics; Hutter (ETH) → ANYbotics/RIVR + the legged_gym recipe; Hwangbo (ETH PhD) → KAIST → Raion. Most of the world's learned-locomotion stacks trace to two labs (ETH RSL and its descendants; MIT's Cheetah line) — see Locomotion.
  • Acquisition beats competition for corporates: Google (SCHAFT), Amazon (Covariant team, RIVR), Samsung (Rainbow), Hyundai (Boston Dynamics) all bought academic lineages rather than growing them; OpenAI and Meta instead hired individuals (OpenAI's Kalinowski era; Meta's confirmed Sangbae Kim hire) with mixed results (Organizations).
  • Benchmark power is soft power: whoever maintains the scorecard (Stanford's BEHAVIOR challenge, UT Austin's LIBERO, Fudan's LIBERO-Plus, Shanghai AI Lab's EIbench) frames what "state of the art" means — see State of the art and Evaluation.

Open questions

  • Can universities still do frontier work as training runs move beyond academic compute budgets? The 2026 hedge is infrastructure gifts (NVIDIA GR00T reference robots, cloud credits) — which also deepens vendor lock-in.
  • Does the dual-hat model survive conflicts of interest at scale (professor-founders reviewing competitors' papers, students as de-facto startup employees)? No institution has published a clear policy (as of 2026-07).
  • Will Europe/Japan convert research excellence into domestic companies, or continue exporting labs' output to US/China acquirers (RIVR, SCHAFT precedents)?
  • Entity-list dynamics: HIT and other Chinese defense-linked universities are cut off from US collaboration, yet their spinoffs (Leju) commercialize freely — an asymmetry with no US policy answer yet (Safety & regulation).
